Objective Develop a comprehensive web application named 'NewsPortal' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to browse news articles by category, read detailed articles, bookmark favorites, view comments, and track trending articles. No authentication required - all features are directly accessible. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.  ## 2. Language The required development language for the 'NewsPortal' application is Python.  ## 3. Page Design  The 'NewsPortal' web application will consist of the following nine pages:  ### 1. Dashboard Page - **Page Title**: News Portal - **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured articles, trending news, and quick navigation to all functionalities. - **Elements**:   - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.   - **ID: featured-articles** - Type: Div - Display of featured article recommendations.   - **ID: browse-articles-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to article catalog page.   - **ID: view-bookmarks-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to bookmarks page.   - **ID: trending-articles-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to trending articles page.  ### 2. Article Catalog Page - **Page Title**: Article Catalog - **Overview**: A page displaying all available articles with search and filter capabilities. - **Elements**:   - **ID: catalog-page** - Type: Div - Container for the catalog page.   - **ID: search-input** - Type: Input - Field to search articles by title, author, or keywords.   - **ID: category-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by category (Technology, Sports, Business, Health, Entertainment, etc.).   - **ID: articles-grid** - Type: Div - Grid displaying article cards with thumbnail, title, author, and date.   - **ID: view-article-button-{article_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view article details (each article card has this).  ### 3. Article Details Page - **Page Title**: Article Details - **Overview**: A page displaying detailed information about a specific article. - **Elements**:   - **ID: article-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the article details page.   - **ID: article-title** - Type: H1 - Display article title.   - **ID: article-author** - Type: Div - Display article author.   - **ID: article-date** - Type: Div - Display article publication date.   - **ID: bookmark-button** - Type: Button - Button to bookmark the article.   - **ID: article-content** - Type: Div - Section displaying the full article content.  ### 4. Bookmarks Page - **Page Title**: My Bookmarks - **Overview**: A page displaying all bookmarked articles with removal and reading options. - **Elements**:   - **ID: bookmarks-page** - Type: Div - Container for the bookmarks page.   - **ID: bookmarks-list** - Type: Div - List displaying all bookmarked articles with title and date.   - **ID: remove-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}** - Type: Button - Button to remove bookmark (each bookmark has this).   - **ID: read-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}** - Type: Button - Button to read bookmarked article (each bookmark has this).   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 5. Comments Page - **Page Title**: Article Comments - **Overview**: A page displaying all comments on articles and allowing users to write new comments. - **Elements**:   - **ID: comments-page** - Type: Div - Container for the comments page.   - **ID: comments-list** - Type: Div - List of all comments with article title, commenter name, and comment text.   - **ID: write-comment-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to write comment page.   - **ID: filter-by-article** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter comments by article.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 6. Write Comment Page - **Page Title**: Write a Comment - **Overview**: A page for users to write comments on articles. - **Elements**:   - **ID: write-comment-page** - Type: Div - Container for the write comment page.   - **ID: select-article** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select article to comment on.   - **ID: commenter-name** - Type: Input - Field to input commenter name.   - **ID: comment-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to write comment text.   - **ID: submit-comment-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit comment.  ### 7. Trending Articles Page - **Page Title**: Trending Articles - **Overview**: A page displaying top trending articles ranked by views and engagement. - **Elements**:   - **ID: trending-page** - Type: Div - Container for the trending articles page.   - **ID: trending-list** - Type: Div - Ranked list of trending articles with rank, title, category, and view count.   - **ID: time-period-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by time period (Today, This Week, This Month).   - **ID: view-article-button-{article_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view article details (each trending article has this).   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 8. Category Page - **Page Title**: Category Articles - **Overview**: A page displaying articles from a specific category. - **Elements**:   - **ID: category-page** - Type: Div - Container for the category page.   - **ID: category-title** - Type: H1 - Display the category name.   - **ID: category-articles** - Type: Div - List of articles in the selected category.   - **ID: sort-by-date** - Type: Button - Button to sort articles by date.   - **ID: sort-by-popularity** - Type: Button - Button to sort articles by popularity.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 9. Search Results Page - **Page Title**: Search Results - **Overview**: A page displaying search results based on user query. - **Elements**:   - **ID: search-results-page** - Type: Div - Container for the search results page.   - **ID: search-query-display** - Type: Div - Display the search query performed.   - **ID: results-list** - Type: Div - List of search results with article title and excerpt.   - **ID: no-results-message** - Type: Div - Message displayed when no results found.   - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ## 4. Data Storage  The 'NewsPortal' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:  ### 1. Articles Data - **File Name**: `articles.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   article_id|title|author|category|content|date|views   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|John Smith|Technology|Revolutionary advancement in quantum computing announced today|2025-01-20|5432   2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sarah Johnson|Sports|Team wins the national championship with a thrilling final match|2025-01-19|3210   3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Michael Chen|Business|Expert analysis of current market conditions and forecasts|2025-01-18|2891   ```  ### 2. Categories Data - **File Name**: `categories.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   category_id|category_name|description   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|Technology|Latest tech news and innovations   2|Sports|Sports news and event coverage   3|Business|Business and finance news   ```  ### 3. Bookmarks Data - **File Name**: `bookmarks.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   bookmark_id|article_id|article_title|bookmarked_date   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|2025-01-20   2|3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|2025-01-18   ```  ### 4. Comments Data - **File Name**: `comments.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   comment_id|article_id|article_title|commenter_name|comment_text|comment_date   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Alice Davis|Fascinating development!|2025-01-20   2|2|Sports: Championship Victory|Robert Wilson|Amazing performance by the team!|2025-01-19   ```  ### 5. Trending Data - **File Name**: `trending.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   article_id|article_title|category|view_count|period   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Technology|5432|This Week   2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sports|3210|This Week   3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Business|2891|This Month   ```

Div ID: `category-container`\n  - Div ID: `category-name`\n  - List ID: `category-articles-list`\n  - Button ID: `sort-by-popularity-button`\n  - Button ID: `back-to-dashboard-button`\n\n### Search Results Page\n- Template ID: `search_results`\n- Displays result list for user search queries.\n- Key Elements:\n  - Div ID: `search-results-container`\n  - Div ID: `search-query-display`\n  - List ID: `results-list`\n  - Div ID: `no-results-message`\n\n---\n\n## 4. Data Schemas\n\nThe application stores data in text files under the directory `data/` locally.\n\n### Articles Data (articles.txt)\n- Format: `article_id|category|title|author|date|view_count|content`\n- Example Row:\n  `1|Technology|Revolutionary Tech Breakthrough|John Smith|2025-01-20|1024|Full article content here...`\n\n### Categories Data (categories.txt)\n- Format: `category_id|category_name|description`\n- Example Row:\n  `1|Technology|Latest news and innovations`\n\n### Bookmarks Data (bookmarks.txt)\n- Format: `bookmark_id|article_id|article_title|bookmarked_date`\n\n### Comments Data (comments.txt)\n- Format: `comment_id|article_id|commenter_name|comment_text|comment_date`\n\n### Trending Data (trending.txt)\n- Format: `article_id|article_title|category|view_count|period`\n\n---\n\n## 5. Additional Notes\n\n- Variable names, IDs, and naming conventions are preserved as per user data samples.\n- The Flask app will utilize Jinja2 templating for dynamic content rendering.\n- Navigation elements (buttons/links) will correspond to URL routing defined.\n- Routes will handle GET requests mostly; POST where necessary for comment submission.\n- Consistency across pages with clear navigation is ensured.\n- Use of standard HTML5 tags and CSS classes will be assumed but not detailed here.\n- No authentication simplifies user flow.\n\n---\n\n*Spec document generated fully aligned with user provided data and requirements.*\n"})

=== user_task_description ===

# Requirements Document for 'NewsPortal' Web Application

## 1. Objective
Develop a comprehensive web application named 'NewsPortal' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to browse news articles by category, read detailed articles, bookmark favorites, view comments, and track trending articles. No authentication required - all features are directly accessible. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.

## 2. Language
The required development language for the 'NewsPortal' application is Python.

## 3. Page Design

The 'NewsPortal' web application will consist of the following nine pages:

### 1. Dashboard Page
- **Page Title**: News Portal
- **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured articles, trending news, and quick navigation to all functionalities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.
  - **ID: featured-articles** - Type: Div - Display of featured article recommendations.
  - **ID: browse-articles-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to article catalog page.
  - **ID: view-bookmarks-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to bookmarks page.
  - **ID: trending-articles-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to trending articles page.

### 2. Article Catalog Page
- **Page Title**: Article Catalog
- **Overview**: A page displaying all available articles with search and filter capabilities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: catalog-page** - Type: Div - Container for the catalog page.
  - **ID: search-input** - Type: Input - Field to search articles by title, author, or keywords.
  - **ID: category-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by category (Technology, Sports, Business, Health, Entertainment, etc.).
  - **ID: articles-grid** - Type: Div - Grid displaying article cards with thumbnail, title, author, and date.
  - **ID: view-article-button-{article_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view article details (each article card has this).

### 3. Article Details Page
- **Page Title**: Article Details
- **Overview**: A page displaying detailed information about a specific article.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: article-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the article details page.
  - **ID: article-title** - Type: H1 - Display article title.
  - **ID: article-author** - Type: Div - Display article author.
  - **ID: article-date** - Type: Div - Display article publication date.
  - **ID: bookmark-button** - Type: Button - Button to bookmark the article.
  - **ID: article-content** - Type: Div - Section displaying the full article content.

### 4. Bookmarks Page
- **Page Title**: My Bookmarks
- **Overview**: A page displaying all bookmarked articles with removal and reading options.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: bookmarks-page** - Type: Div - Container for the bookmarks page.
  - **ID: bookmarks-list** - Type: Div - List displaying all bookmarked articles with title and date.
  - **ID: remove-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}** - Type: Button - Button to remove bookmark (each bookmark has this).
  - **ID: read-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}** - Type: Button - Button to read bookmarked article (each bookmark has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 5. Comments Page
- **Page Title**: Article Comments
- **Overview**: A page displaying all comments on articles and allowing users to write new comments.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: comments-page** - Type: Div - Container for the comments page.
  - **ID: comments-list** - Type: Div - List of all comments with article title, commenter name, and comment text.
  - **ID: write-comment-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to write comment page.
  - **ID: filter-by-article** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter comments by article.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 6. Write Comment Page
- **Page Title**: Write a Comment
- **Overview**: A page for users to write comments on articles.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: write-comment-page** - Type: Div - Container for the write comment page.
  - **ID: select-article** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select article to comment on.
  - **ID: commenter-name** - Type: Input - Field to input commenter name.
  - **ID: comment-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to write comment text.
  - **ID: submit-comment-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit comment.

### 7. Trending Articles Page
- **Page Title**: Trending Articles
- **Overview**: A page displaying top trending articles ranked by views and engagement.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: trending-page** - Type: Div - Container for the trending articles page.
  - **ID: trending-list** - Type: Div - Ranked list of trending articles with rank, title, category, and view count.
  - **ID: time-period-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by time period (Today, This Week, This Month).
  - **ID: view-article-button-{article_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view article details (each trending article has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 8. Category Page
- **Page Title**: Category Articles
- **Overview**: A page displaying articles from a specific category.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: category-page** - Type: Div - Container for the category page.
  - **ID: category-title** - Type: H1 - Display the category name.
  - **ID: category-articles** - Type: Div - List of articles in the selected category.
  - **ID: sort-by-date** - Type: Button - Button to sort articles by date.
  - **ID: sort-by-popularity** - Type: Button - Button to sort articles by popularity.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 9. Search Results Page
- **Page Title**: Search Results
- **Overview**: A page displaying search results based on user query.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: search-results-page** - Type: Div - Container for the search results page.
  - **ID: search-query-display** - Type: Div - Display the search query performed.
  - **ID: results-list** - Type: Div - List of search results with article title and excerpt.
  - **ID: no-results-message** - Type: Div - Message displayed when no results found.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

## 4. Data Storage

The 'NewsPortal' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:

### 1. Articles Data
- **File Name**: `articles.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  article_id|title|author|category|content|date|views
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|John Smith|Technology|Revolutionary advancement in quantum computing announced today|2025-01-20|5432
  2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sarah Johnson|Sports|Team wins the national championship with a thrilling final match|2025-01-19|3210
  3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Michael Chen|Business|Expert analysis of current market conditions and forecasts|2025-01-18|2891
  ```

### 2. Categories Data
- **File Name**: `categories.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  category_id|category_name|description
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Technology|Latest tech news and innovations
  2|Sports|Sports news and event coverage
  3|Business|Business and finance news
  ```

### 3. Bookmarks Data
- **File Name**: `bookmarks.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  bookmark_id|article_id|article_title|bookmarked_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|2025-01-20
  2|3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|2025-01-18
  ```

### 4. Comments Data
- **File Name**: `comments.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  comment_id|article_id|article_title|commenter_name|comment_text|comment_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Alice Davis|Fascinating development!|2025-01-20
  2|2|Sports: Championship Victory|Robert Wilson|Amazing performance by the team!|2025-01-19
  ```

### 5. Trending Data
- **File Name**: `trending.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  article_id|article_title|category|view_count|period
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Technology|5432|This Week
  2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sports|3210|This Week
  3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Business|2891|This Month
  ```

INPUT: === Original Task ===
Create design_spec.md with Flask Routes, HTML Templates, and Data Schemas based on user_task_description in CONTEXT
=== user_task_description ===

# Requirements Document for 'NewsPortal' Web Application

## 1. Objective
Develop a comprehensive web application named 'NewsPortal' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to browse news articles by category, read detailed articles, bookmark favorites, view comments, and track trending articles. No authentication required - all features are directly accessible. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.

## 2. Language
The required development language for the 'NewsPortal' application is Python.

## 3. Page Design

The 'NewsPortal' web application will consist of the following nine pages:

### 1. Dashboard Page
- **Page Title**: News Portal
- **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured articles, trending news, and quick navigation to all functionalities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.
  - **ID: featured-articles** - Type: Div - Display of featured article recommendations.
  - **ID: browse-articles-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to article catalog page.
  - **ID: view-bookmarks-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to bookmarks page.
  - **ID: trending-articles-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to trending articles page.

### 2. Article Catalog Page
- **Page Title**: Article Catalog
- **Overview**: A page displaying all available articles with search and filter capabilities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: catalog-page** - Type: Div - Container for the catalog page.
  - **ID: search-input** - Type: Input - Field to search articles by title, author, or keywords.
  - **ID: category-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by category (Technology, Sports, Business, Health, Entertainment, etc.).
  - **ID: articles-grid** - Type: Div - Grid displaying article cards with thumbnail, title, author, and date.
  - **ID: view-article-button-{article_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view article details (each article card has this).

### 3. Article Details Page
- **Page Title**: Article Details
- **Overview**: A page displaying detailed information about a specific article.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: article-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the article details page.
  - **ID: article-title** - Type: H1 - Display article title.
  - **ID: article-author** - Type: Div - Display article author.
  - **ID: article-date** - Type: Div - Display article publication date.
  - **ID: bookmark-button** - Type: Button - Button to bookmark the article.
  - **ID: article-content** - Type: Div - Section displaying the full article content.

### 4. Bookmarks Page
- **Page Title**: My Bookmarks
- **Overview**: A page displaying all bookmarked articles with removal and reading options.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: bookmarks-page** - Type: Div - Container for the bookmarks page.
  - **ID: bookmarks-list** - Type: Div - List displaying all bookmarked articles with title and date.
  - **ID: remove-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}** - Type: Button - Button to remove bookmark (each bookmark has this).
  - **ID: read-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}** - Type: Button - Button to read bookmarked article (each bookmark has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 5. Comments Page
- **Page Title**: Article Comments
- **Overview**: A page displaying all comments on articles and allowing users to write new comments.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: comments-page** - Type: Div - Container for the comments page.
  - **ID: comments-list** - Type: Div - List of all comments with article title, commenter name, and comment text.
  - **ID: write-comment-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to write comment page.
  - **ID: filter-by-article** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter comments by article.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 6. Write Comment Page
- **Page Title**: Write a Comment
- **Overview**: A page for users to write comments on articles.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: write-comment-page** - Type: Div - Container for the write comment page.
  - **ID: select-article** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select article to comment on.
  - **ID: commenter-name** - Type: Input - Field to input commenter name.
  - **ID: comment-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to write comment text.
  - **ID: submit-comment-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit comment.

### 7. Trending Articles Page
- **Page Title**: Trending Articles
- **Overview**: A page displaying top trending articles ranked by views and engagement.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: trending-page** - Type: Div - Container for the trending articles page.
  - **ID: trending-list** - Type: Div - Ranked list of trending articles with rank, title, category, and view count.
  - **ID: time-period-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by time period (Today, This Week, This Month).
  - **ID: view-article-button-{article_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view article details (each trending article has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 8. Category Page
- **Page Title**: Category Articles
- **Overview**: A page displaying articles from a specific category.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: category-page** - Type: Div - Container for the category page.
  - **ID: category-title** - Type: H1 - Display the category name.
  - **ID: category-articles** - Type: Div - List of articles in the selected category.
  - **ID: sort-by-date** - Type: Button - Button to sort articles by date.
  - **ID: sort-by-popularity** - Type: Button - Button to sort articles by popularity.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 9. Search Results Page
- **Page Title**: Search Results
- **Overview**: A page displaying search results based on user query.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: search-results-page** - Type: Div - Container for the search results page.
  - **ID: search-query-display** - Type: Div - Display the search query performed.
  - **ID: results-list** - Type: Div - List of search results with article title and excerpt.
  - **ID: no-results-message** - Type: Div - Message displayed when no results found.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

## 4. Data Storage

The 'NewsPortal' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:

### 1. Articles Data
- **File Name**: `articles.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  article_id|title|author|category|content|date|views
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|John Smith|Technology|Revolutionary advancement in quantum computing announced today|2025-01-20|5432
  2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sarah Johnson|Sports|Team wins the national championship with a thrilling final match|2025-01-19|3210
  3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Michael Chen|Business|Expert analysis of current market conditions and forecasts|2025-01-18|2891
  ```

### 2. Categories Data
- **File Name**: `categories.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  category_id|category_name|description
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Technology|Latest tech news and innovations
  2|Sports|Sports news and event coverage
  3|Business|Business and finance news
  ```

### 3. Bookmarks Data
- **File Name**: `bookmarks.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  bookmark_id|article_id|article_title|bookmarked_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|2025-01-20
  2|3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|2025-01-18
  ```

### 4. Comments Data
- **File Name**: `comments.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  comment_id|article_id|article_title|commenter_name|comment_text|comment_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Alice Davis|Fascinating development!|2025-01-20
  2|2|Sports: Championship Victory|Robert Wilson|Amazing performance by the team!|2025-01-19
  ```

### 5. Trending Data
- **File Name**: `trending.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  article_id|article_title|category|view_count|period
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Technology|5432|This Week
  2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sports|3210|This Week
  3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Business|2891|This Month
  ```

`search-results-container` (div): Container\n  - `search-query-display` (div): Display search query\n  - `results-list` (list): List of matching articles\n  - `no-results-message` (div): Message when no results found\n  - `back-to-dashboard-button` (button): Return to dashboard\n\n\n## 4. Data File Schemas\n\n### 4.1 Articles Data - `data/articles.txt`\n- Fields in order (no header):\n  - article_id (string): Unique ID\n  - title (string): Article title\n  - author (string): Article author\n  - category (string): Article category\n  - content (string): Full text content\n  - date (string): Publication date (YYYY-MM-DD)\n  - views (integer): Number of views\n- Example row:\n  `1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|John Smith|Technology|Full article content here...|2025-01-20|5432`\n\n### 4.2 Categories Data - `data/categories.txt`\n- Fields in order:\n  - category_id (string): Unique ID\n  - name (string): Category name\n  - description (string): Description of category\n- Example row:\n  `1|Technology|Latest news and innovations`\n\n### 4.3 Bookmarks Data - `data/bookmarks.txt`\n- Fields in order:\n  - bookmark_id (string): Unique bookmark ID\n  - article_id (string): ID of bookmarked article\n  - article_title (string): Title of bookmarked article\n  - bookmarked_date (string): Date bookmarked\n\n### 4.4 Comments Data - `data/comments.txt`\n- Fields in order:\n  - comment_id (string): Unique comment ID\n  - article_id (string): ID of article commented on\n  - commenter_name (string): Name of commenter\n  - comment_text (string): Comment text\n  - comment_date (string): Date of comment submission\n\n### 4.5 Trending Data - `data/trending.txt`\n- Fields in order:\n  - article_id (string): Unique article ID\n  - article_title (string): Article title\n  - category (string): Article category\n  - view_count (integer): Number of views\n  - period (string): Time period (Today, Week, Month)\n- Example row:\n  `1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Technology|5432|This Week`\n\n\n## 5. # Requirements Document for 'NewsPortal' Web Application

## 1. Objective
Develop a comprehensive web application named 'NewsPortal' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to browse news articles by category, read detailed articles, bookmark favorites, view comments, and track trending articles. No authentication required - all features are directly accessible. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.

## 2. Language
The required development language for the 'NewsPortal' application is Python.

## 3. Page Design

The 'NewsPortal' web application will consist of the following nine pages:

### 1. Dashboard Page
- **Page Title**: News Portal
- **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured articles, trending news, and quick navigation to all functionalities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.
  - **ID: featured-articles** - Type: Div - Display of featured article recommendations.
  - **ID: browse-articles-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to article catalog page.
  - **ID: view-bookmarks-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to bookmarks page.
  - **ID: trending-articles-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to trending articles page.

### 2. Article Catalog Page
- **Page Title**: Article Catalog
- **Overview**: A page displaying all available articles with search and filter capabilities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: catalog-page** - Type: Div - Container for the catalog page.
  - **ID: search-input** - Type: Input - Field to search articles by title, author, or keywords.
  - **ID: category-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by category (Technology, Sports, Business, Health, Entertainment, etc.).
  - **ID: articles-grid** - Type: Div - Grid displaying article cards with thumbnail, title, author, and date.
  - **ID: view-article-button-{article_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view article details (each article card has this).

### 3. Article Details Page
- **Page Title**: Article Details
- **Overview**: A page displaying detailed information about a specific article.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: article-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the article details page.
  - **ID: article-title** - Type: H1 - Display article title.
  - **ID: article-author** - Type: Div - Display article author.
  - **ID: article-date** - Type: Div - Display article publication date.
  - **ID: bookmark-button** - Type: Button - Button to bookmark the article.
  - **ID: article-content** - Type: Div - Section displaying the full article content.

### 4. Bookmarks Page
- **Page Title**: My Bookmarks
- **Overview**: A page displaying all bookmarked articles with removal and reading options.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: bookmarks-page** - Type: Div - Container for the bookmarks page.
  - **ID: bookmarks-list** - Type: Div - List displaying all bookmarked articles with title and date.
  - **ID: remove-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}** - Type: Button - Button to remove bookmark (each bookmark has this).
  - **ID: read-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}** - Type: Button - Button to read bookmarked article (each bookmark has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 5. Comments Page
- **Page Title**: Article Comments
- **Overview**: A page displaying all comments on articles and allowing users to write new comments.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: comments-page** - Type: Div - Container for the comments page.
  - **ID: comments-list** - Type: Div - List of all comments with article title, commenter name, and comment text.
  - **ID: write-comment-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to write comment page.
  - **ID: filter-by-article** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter comments by article.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 6. Write Comment Page
- **Page Title**: Write a Comment
- **Overview**: A page for users to write comments on articles.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: write-comment-page** - Type: Div - Container for the write comment page.
  - **ID: select-article** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select article to comment on.
  - **ID: commenter-name** - Type: Input - Field to input commenter name.
  - **ID: comment-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to write comment text.
  - **ID: submit-comment-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit comment.

### 7. Trending Articles Page
- **Page Title**: Trending Articles
- **Overview**: A page displaying top trending articles ranked by views and engagement.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: trending-page** - Type: Div - Container for the trending articles page.
  - **ID: trending-list** - Type: Div - Ranked list of trending articles with rank, title, category, and view count.
  - **ID: time-period-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by time period (Today, This Week, This Month).
  - **ID: view-article-button-{article_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view article details (each trending article has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 8. Category Page
- **Page Title**: Category Articles
- **Overview**: A page displaying articles from a specific category.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: category-page** - Type: Div - Container for the category page.
  - **ID: category-title** - Type: H1 - Display the category name.
  - **ID: category-articles** - Type: Div - List of articles in the selected category.
  - **ID: sort-by-date** - Type: Button - Button to sort articles by date.
  - **ID: sort-by-popularity** - Type: Button - Button to sort articles by popularity.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 9. Search Results Page
- **Page Title**: Search Results
- **Overview**: A page displaying search results based on user query.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: search-results-page** - Type: Div - Container for the search results page.
  - **ID: search-query-display** - Type: Div - Display the search query performed.
  - **ID: results-list** - Type: Div - List of search results with article title and excerpt.
  - **ID: no-results-message** - Type: Div - Message displayed when no results found.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

## 4. Data Storage

The 'NewsPortal' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:

### 1. Articles Data
- **File Name**: `articles.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  article_id|title|author|category|content|date|views
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|John Smith|Technology|Revolutionary advancement in quantum computing announced today|2025-01-20|5432
  2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sarah Johnson|Sports|Team wins the national championship with a thrilling final match|2025-01-19|3210
  3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Michael Chen|Business|Expert analysis of current market conditions and forecasts|2025-01-18|2891
  ```

### 2. Categories Data
- **File Name**: `categories.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  category_id|category_name|description
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Technology|Latest tech news and innovations
  2|Sports|Sports news and event coverage
  3|Business|Business and finance news
  ```

### 3. Bookmarks Data
- **File Name**: `bookmarks.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  bookmark_id|article_id|article_title|bookmarked_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|2025-01-20
  2|3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|2025-01-18
  ```

### 4. Comments Data
- **File Name**: `comments.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  comment_id|article_id|article_title|commenter_name|comment_text|comment_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Alice Davis|Fascinating development!|2025-01-20
  2|2|Sports: Championship Victory|Robert Wilson|Amazing performance by the team!|2025-01-19
  ```

### 5. Trending Data
- **File Name**: `trending.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  article_id|article_title|category|view_count|period
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Technology|5432|This Week
  2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sports|3210|This Week
  3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Business|2891|This Month
  ```

## 1. Objective
Develop a comprehensive web application named 'NewsPortal' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to browse news articles by category, read detailed articles, bookmark favorites, view comments, and track trending articles. No authentication required - all features are directly accessible. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.

The 'NewsPortal' web application will consist of the following nine pages:

### 1. Dashboard Page
- **Page Title**: News Portal
- **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured articles, trending news, and quick navigation to all functionalities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.
  - **ID: featured-articles** - Type: Div - Display of featured article recommendations.
  - **ID: browse-articles-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to article catalog page.
  - **ID: view-bookmarks-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to bookmarks page.
  - **ID: trending-articles-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to trending articles page.

### 2. Article Catalog Page
- **Page Title**: Article Catalog
- **Overview**: A page displaying all available articles with search and filter capabilities.
- **Elements**:

  - **ID: search-input** - Type: Input - Field to search articles by title, author, or keywords.
  - **ID: category-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by category (Technology, Sports, Business, Health, Entertainment, etc.).
  - **ID: articles-grid** - Type: Div - Grid displaying article cards with thumbnail, title, author, and date.
  - **ID: view-article-button-{article_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view article details (each article card has this).

### 3. Article Details Page

  - **ID: no-results-message** - Type: Div - Message displayed when no results found.


  ```
  1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|2025-01-20
  2|3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|2025-01-18
  ```

### 4. Comments Data

  ```
  comment_id|article_id|article_title|commenter_name|comment_text|comment_date
  ```

# Requirements Document for 'NewsPortal' Web Application

## 1. Objective
Develop a comprehensive web application named 'NewsPortal' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to browse news articles by category, read detailed articles, bookmark favorites, view comments, and track trending articles. No authentication required - all features are directly accessible. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.

## 2. Language
The required development language for the 'NewsPortal' application is Python.

## 3. Page Design

The 'NewsPortal' web application will consist of the following nine pages:

### 1. Dashboard Page
- **Page Title**: News Portal
- **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured articles, trending news, and quick navigation to all functionalities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.
  - **ID: featured-articles** - Type: Div - Display of featured article recommendations.
  - **ID: browse-articles-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to article catalog page.
  - **ID: view-bookmarks-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to bookmarks page.
  - **ID: trending-articles-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to trending articles page.

### 2. Article Catalog Page
- **Page Title**: Article Catalog
- **Overview**: A page displaying all available articles with search and filter capabilities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: catalog-page** - Type: Div - Container for the catalog page.
  - **ID: search-input** - Type: Input - Field to search articles by title, author, or keywords.
  - **ID: category-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by category (Technology, Sports, Business, Health, Entertainment, etc.).
  - **ID: articles-grid** - Type: Div - Grid displaying article cards with thumbnail, title, author, and date.
  - **ID: view-article-button-{article_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view article details (each article card has this).

### 3. Article Details Page
- **Page Title**: Article Details
- **Overview**: A page displaying detailed information about a specific article.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: article-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the article details page.
  - **ID: article-title** - Type: H1 - Display article title.
  - **ID: article-author** - Type: Div - Display article author.
  - **ID: article-date** - Type: Div - Display article publication date.
  - **ID: bookmark-button** - Type: Button - Button to bookmark the article.
  - **ID: article-content** - Type: Div - Section displaying the full article content.

### 4. Bookmarks Page
- **Page Title**: My Bookmarks
- **Overview**: A page displaying all bookmarked articles with removal and reading options.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: bookmarks-page** - Type: Div - Container for the bookmarks page.
  - **ID: bookmarks-list** - Type: Div - List displaying all bookmarked articles with title and date.
  - **ID: remove-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}** - Type: Button - Button to remove bookmark (each bookmark has this).
  - **ID: read-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}** - Type: Button - Button to read bookmarked article (each bookmark has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 5. Comments Page
- **Page Title**: Article Comments
- **Overview**: A page displaying all comments on articles and allowing users to write new comments.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: comments-page** - Type: Div - Container for the comments page.
  - **ID: comments-list** - Type: Div - List of all comments with article title, commenter name, and comment text.
  - **ID: write-comment-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to write comment page.
  - **ID: filter-by-article** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter comments by article.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 6. Write Comment Page
- **Page Title**: Write a Comment
- **Overview**: A page for users to write comments on articles.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: write-comment-page** - Type: Div - Container for the write comment page.
  - **ID: select-article** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select article to comment on.
  - **ID: commenter-name** - Type: Input - Field to input commenter name.
  - **ID: comment-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to write comment text.
  - **ID: submit-comment-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit comment.

### 7. Trending Articles Page
- **Page Title**: Trending Articles
- **Overview**: A page displaying top trending articles ranked by views and engagement.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: trending-page** - Type: Div - Container for the trending articles page.
  - **ID: trending-list** - Type: Div - Ranked list of trending articles with rank, title, category, and view count.
  - **ID: time-period-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by time period (Today, This Week, This Month).
  - **ID: view-article-button-{article_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view article details (each trending article has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 8. Category Page
- **Page Title**: Category Articles
- **Overview**: A page displaying articles from a specific category.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: category-page** - Type: Div - Container for the category page.
  - **ID: category-title** - Type: H1 - Display the category name.
  - **ID: category-articles** - Type: Div - List of articles in the selected category.
  - **ID: sort-by-date** - Type: Button - Button to sort articles by date.
  - **ID: sort-by-popularity** - Type: Button - Button to sort articles by popularity.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 9. Search Results Page
- **Page Title**: Search Results
- **Overview**: A page displaying search results based on user query.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: search-results-page** - Type: Div - Container for the search results page.
  - **ID: search-query-display** - Type: Div - Display the search query performed.
  - **ID: results-list** - Type: Div - List of search results with article title and excerpt.
  - **ID: no-results-message** - Type: Div - Message displayed when no results found.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

## 4. Data Storage

The 'NewsPortal' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:

### 1. Articles Data
- **File Name**: `articles.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  article_id|title|author|category|content|date|views
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|John Smith|Technology|Revolutionary advancement in quantum computing announced today|2025-01-20|5432
  2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sarah Johnson|Sports|Team wins the national championship with a thrilling final match|2025-01-19|3210
  3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Michael Chen|Business|Expert analysis of current market conditions and forecasts|2025-01-18|2891
  ```

### 2. Categories Data
- **File Name**: `categories.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  category_id|category_name|description
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Technology|Latest tech news and innovations
  2|Sports|Sports news and event coverage
  3|Business|Business and finance news
  ```

### 3. Bookmarks Data
- **File Name**: `bookmarks.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  bookmark_id|article_id|article_title|bookmarked_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|2025-01-20
  2|3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|2025-01-18
  ```

### 4. Comments Data
- **File Name**: `comments.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  comment_id|article_id|article_title|commenter_name|comment_text|comment_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Alice Davis|Fascinating development!|2025-01-20
  2|2|Sports: Championship Victory|Robert Wilson|Amazing performance by the team!|2025-01-19
  ```

### 5. Trending Data
- **File Name**: `trending.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  article_id|article_title|category|view_count|period
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Technology|5432|This Week
  2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sports|3210|This Week
  3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Business|2891|This Month
  ```

Objective\n\nDevelop a comprehensive web application using Python Flask framework that allows users to browse, search, and filter news articles by category, read articles, manage favorites/bookmarks, post comments, and view trending articles. No user authentication is required. The app should start directly at the dashboard page.\n\n---\n\n## 2. Routes\n\n| Path                  | URL Endpoint                | HTTP Method | Description                             |\n|-----------------------|-----------------------------|-------------|---------------------------------------|\n| /                     | /                           | GET         | Dashboard page showing featured content |\n| /catalog              | /catalog                    | GET         | Display article catalog with search and filter |\n| /article/<article_id> | /article/<article_id>       | GET         | Display detailed article page           |\n| /bookmarks            | /bookmarks                  | GET         | Show all bookmarks                      |\n| /comments             | /comments                   | GET         | Show comments listing page              |\n| /comments/write/<article_id> | /comments/write/<article_id> | GET, POST    | Page to write and submit comments       |\n| /trending             | /trending                   | GET         | Display trending articles               |\n| /category/<category_id>| /category/<category_id>     | GET         | Display articles by selected category  |\n| /search               | /search                     | GET         | Search results based on query           |\n\n---\n\n## 3. Templates\n\n### Dashboard Page\n- Template ID: `dashboard`\n- Displays featured articles, latest news, and quick navigation buttons.\n- Key Elements:\n  - Div ID: `dashboard-container` (container div for dashboard)\n  - Div ID: `featured-article` (show one featured article)\n  - Button ID: `browse-articles-button` (navigate to catalog)\n  - Button ID: `read-article-button` (navigate to article page)\n\n### Article Catalog Page\n- Template ID: `catalog`\n- Features search bar, category filters, and article cards grid.\n- Key Elements:\n  - Div ID: `catalog-container`\n  - Input ID: `search-input`\n  - Dropdown ID: `filter-category`\n  - Grid ID: `articles-grid`\n\n### Article Detail Page\n- Template ID: `article_detail`\n- Shows detailed info of a selected article.\n- Key Elements:\n  - Div ID: `article-detail-container`\n  - Div ID: `article-title`\n  - Div ID: `article-author`\n  - Div ID: `article-date`\n  - Button ID: `bookmark-article-button`\n\n### Bookmarks Page\n- Template ID: `bookmarks`\n- List all bookmarks with option to remove and navigate back.\n- Key Elements:\n  - Div ID: `bookmarks-container`\n  - List ID: `bookmarks-list`\n  - Button ID: `remove-bookmark-button-<bookmark_id>` for each bookmark\n  - Button ID: `back-to-dashboard-button`\n\n### Comments Page\n- Template ID: `comments`\n- Lists comments and enables navigation to write comment page.\n- Key Elements:\n  - Div ID: `comments-container`\n  - Div ID: `comments-list`\n  - Button ID: `write-comment-button`\n\n### Write Comment Page\n- Template ID: `write_comment`\n- Form to submit new comments.\n- Key Elements:\n  - Div ID: `write-comment-container`\n  - Input ID: `commenter-name`\n  - Textarea ID: `comment-text`\n  - Button ID: `submit-comment-button`\n\n### Trending Page\n- Template ID: `trending`\n- Displays trending articles list based on view counts.\n- Key Elements:\n  - Div ID: `trending-container`\n  - Div ID: `trending-list`\n  - Dropdown ID: `time-period-filter`\n  - Button ID: `view-details-button`\n\n### Category Page\n- Template ID: `category`\n- Lists articles for a selected category with sorting option.\n- Key Elements:\n  - Div ID: `category-container`\n  - Div ID: `category-name`\n  - List ID: `category-articles-list`\n  - Button ID: `sort-by-popularity-button`\n  - Button ID: `back-to-dashboard-button`\n\n### Search Results Page\n- Template ID: `search_results`\n- Displays result list for user search queries.\n- Key Elements:\n  - Div ID: `search-results-container`\n  - Div ID: `search-query-display`\n  - List ID: `results-list`\n  - Div ID: `no-results-message`\n\n---\n\n## 4. Data Schemas\n\nThe application stores data in text files under the directory `data/` locally.\n\n### Articles Data (articles.txt)\n- Format: `article_id|category|title|author|date|view_count|content`\n- Example Row:\n  `1|Technology|Revolutionary Tech Breakthrough|John Smith|2025-01-20|1024|Full article content here...`\n\n### Categories Data (categories.txt)\n- Format: `category_id|category_name|description`\n- Example Row:\n  `1|Technology|Latest news and innovations`\n\n### Bookmarks Data (bookmarks.txt)\n- Format: `bookmark_id|article_id|article_title|bookmarked_date`\n\n### Comments Data (comments.txt)\n- Format: `comment_id|article_id|commenter_name|comment_text|comment_date`\n\n### Trending Data (trending.txt)\n- Format: `article_id|article_title|category|view_count|period`\n\n---\n\n## 5. Additional Notes\n\n- Variable names, IDs, and naming conventions are preserved as per user data samples.\n- The Flask app will utilize Jinja2 templating for dynamic content rendering.\n- Navigation elements (buttons/links) will correspond to URL routing defined.\n- Routes will handle GET requests mostly; POST where necessary for comment submission.\n- Consistency across pages with clear navigation is ensured.\n- Use of standard HTML5 tags and CSS classes will be assumed but not detailed here.\n- No authentication simplifies user flow.\n\n---\n\n*Spec document generated fully aligned with user provided data and requirements.*\n"})

=== user_task_description ===

# Requirements Document for 'NewsPortal' Web Application

## 1. Objective
Develop a comprehensive web application named 'NewsPortal' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to browse news articles by category, read detailed articles, bookmark favorites, view comments, and track trending articles. No authentication required - all features are directly accessible. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.

## 2. Language
The required development language for the 'NewsPortal' application is Python.

## 3. Page Design

The 'NewsPortal' web application will consist of the following nine pages:

### 1. Dashboard Page
- **Page Title**: News Portal
- **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured articles, trending news, and quick navigation to all functionalities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.
  - **ID: featured-articles** - Type: Div - Display of featured article recommendations.
  - **ID: browse-articles-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to article catalog page.
  - **ID: view-bookmarks-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to bookmarks page.
  - **ID: trending-articles-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to trending articles page.

### 2. Article Catalog Page
- **Page Title**: Article Catalog
- **Overview**: A page displaying all available articles with search and filter capabilities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: catalog-page** - Type: Div - Container for the catalog page.
  - **ID: search-input** - Type: Input - Field to search articles by title, author, or keywords.
  - **ID: category-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by category (Technology, Sports, Business, Health, Entertainment, etc.).
  - **ID: articles-grid** - Type: Div - Grid displaying article cards with thumbnail, title, author, and date.
  - **ID: view-article-button-{article_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view article details (each article card has this).

### 3. Article Details Page
- **Page Title**: Article Details
- **Overview**: A page displaying detailed information about a specific article.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: article-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the article details page.
  - **ID: article-title** - Type: H1 - Display article title.
  - **ID: article-author** - Type: Div - Display article author.
  - **ID: article-date** - Type: Div - Display article publication date.
  - **ID: bookmark-button** - Type: Button - Button to bookmark the article.
  - **ID: article-content** - Type: Div - Section displaying the full article content.

### 4. Bookmarks Page
- **Page Title**: My Bookmarks
- **Overview**: A page displaying all bookmarked articles with removal and reading options.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: bookmarks-page** - Type: Div - Container for the bookmarks page.
  - **ID: bookmarks-list** - Type: Div - List displaying all bookmarked articles with title and date.
  - **ID: remove-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}** - Type: Button - Button to remove bookmark (each bookmark has this).
  - **ID: read-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}** - Type: Button - Button to read bookmarked article (each bookmark has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 5. Comments Page
- **Page Title**: Article Comments
- **Overview**: A page displaying all comments on articles and allowing users to write new comments.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: comments-page** - Type: Div - Container for the comments page.
  - **ID: comments-list** - Type: Div - List of all comments with article title, commenter name, and comment text.
  - **ID: write-comment-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to write comment page.
  - **ID: filter-by-article** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter comments by article.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 6. Write Comment Page
- **Page Title**: Write a Comment
- **Overview**: A page for users to write comments on articles.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: write-comment-page** - Type: Div - Container for the write comment page.
  - **ID: select-article** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select article to comment on.
  - **ID: commenter-name** - Type: Input - Field to input commenter name.
  - **ID: comment-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to write comment text.
  - **ID: submit-comment-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit comment.

### 7. Trending Articles Page
- **Page Title**: Trending Articles
- **Overview**: A page displaying top trending articles ranked by views and engagement.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: trending-page** - Type: Div - Container for the trending articles page.
  - **ID: trending-list** - Type: Div - Ranked list of trending articles with rank, title, category, and view count.
  - **ID: time-period-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by time period (Today, This Week, This Month).
  - **ID: view-article-button-{article_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view article details (each trending article has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 8. Category Page
- **Page Title**: Category Articles
- **Overview**: A page displaying articles from a specific category.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: category-page** - Type: Div - Container for the category page.
  - **ID: category-title** - Type: H1 - Display the category name.
  - **ID: category-articles** - Type: Div - List of articles in the selected category.
  - **ID: sort-by-date** - Type: Button - Button to sort articles by date.
  - **ID: sort-by-popularity** - Type: Button - Button to sort articles by popularity.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 9. Search Results Page
- **Page Title**: Search Results
- **Overview**: A page displaying search results based on user query.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: search-results-page** - Type: Div - Container for the search results page.
  - **ID: search-query-display** - Type: Div - Display the search query performed.
  - **ID: results-list** - Type: Div - List of search results with article title and excerpt.
  - **ID: no-results-message** - Type: Div - Message displayed when no results found.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

## 4. Data Storage

The 'NewsPortal' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:

### 1. Articles Data
- **File Name**: `articles.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  article_id|title|author|category|content|date|views
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|John Smith|Technology|Revolutionary advancement in quantum computing announced today|2025-01-20|5432
  2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sarah Johnson|Sports|Team wins the national championship with a thrilling final match|2025-01-19|3210
  3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Michael Chen|Business|Expert analysis of current market conditions and forecasts|2025-01-18|2891
  ```

### 2. Categories Data
- **File Name**: `categories.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  category_id|category_name|description
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Technology|Latest tech news and innovations
  2|Sports|Sports news and event coverage
  3|Business|Business and finance news
  ```

### 3. Bookmarks Data
- **File Name**: `bookmarks.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  bookmark_id|article_id|article_title|bookmarked_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|2025-01-20
  2|3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|2025-01-18
  ```

### 4. Comments Data
- **File Name**: `comments.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  comment_id|article_id|article_title|commenter_name|comment_text|comment_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Alice Davis|Fascinating development!|2025-01-20
  2|2|Sports: Championship Victory|Robert Wilson|Amazing performance by the team!|2025-01-19
  ```

### 5. Trending Data
- **File Name**: `trending.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  article_id|article_title|category|view_count|period
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Technology|5432|This Week
  2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sports|3210|This Week
  3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Business|2891|This Month
  ```

Objective\n\nTo develop a comprehensive web application called 'NewsPortal' using Python Flask framework. The app enables users to browse news articles by category, read article details, manage bookmarks, comment on articles, and view trending articles. No authentication is required. The application starts at the dashboard page.\n\n## 2. Routes Table\n\n| Path                       | URL Endpoint                   | HTTP Method | Description                              |\n|----------------------------|-------------------------------|-------------|------------------------------------------|\n| /                          | /                             | GET         | Dashboard page                          |\n| /catalog                   | /catalog                      | GET         | Article catalog with search & filter   |\n| /article/<article_id>      | /article/<article_id>          | GET         | Detailed article view                   |\n| /bookmarks                 | /bookmarks                    | GET         | List of bookmarked articles            |\n| /comments                  | /comments                     | GET         | Comments listing page                   |\n| /comments/write/<article_id>| /comments/write/<article_id> | GET, POST    | Write and submit a comment              |\n| /trending                  | /trending                    | GET         | Trending articles page                  |\n| /category/<category_id>    | /category/<category_id>        | GET         | Articles filtered by category           |\n| /search                    | /search                       | GET         | Search results page                     |\n\n\n## 3. HTML Templates\n\n### 3.1 Dashboard Page\n- Filepath: `templates/dashboard.html`\n- Title: 'Dashboard'\n- Elements:\n  - `dashboard-page` (div): Container for dashboard\n  - `featured-articles` (div): Displays featured articles\n  - `browse-articles-button` (button): Navigates to article catalog\n  - `bookmarks-button` (button): Navigates to bookmarks page\n  - `trending-button` (button): Navigates to trending page\n\n### 3.2 Article Catalog Page\n- Filepath: `templates/catalog.html`\n- Title: 'Article Catalog'\n- Elements:\n  - `catalog-container` (div): Container for catalog page\n  - `search-input` (input text): Search bar for article keywords\n  - `category-filter` (dropdown): Category filter (Technology, Sports, Business, Entertainment)\n  - `articles-grid` (div): Grid displaying article cards\n  - `read-article-button` (button): Navigates to selected article page\n\n### 3.3 Article Detail Page\n- Filepath: `templates/article_detail.html`\n- Title: 'Article Details'\n- Elements:\n  - `article-detail-container` (div): Main container\n  - `article-title` (div): Article title\n  - `article-author` (div): Article author\n  - `article-date` (div): Publication date\n  - `bookmark-article-button` (button): Button to bookmark article\n  - `article-content` (div): Main content\n\n### 3.4 Bookmarks Page\n- Filepath: `templates/bookmarks.html`\n- Title: 'Bookmarks'\n- Elements:\n  - `bookmarks-container` (div): Container for bookmarks list\n  - `bookmarks-list` (list): List of bookmarks with title and dates\n  - `remove-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}` (button): Remove bookmark button per item\n  - `back-to-dashboard-button` (button): Return to dashboard\n\n### 3.5 Comments Listing Page\n- Filepath: `templates/comments.html`\n- Title: 'Comments'\n- Elements:\n  - `comments-container` (div): Container for comments page\n  - `comments-list` (list): List displaying comment info\n  - `write-comment-button` (button): Navigate to write comment page\n  - `filter-by-article` (dropdown): Filter comments by article\n  - `back-to-dashboard-button` (button): Return to dashboard\n\n### 3.6 Write Comment Page\n- Filepath: `templates/write_comment.html`\n- Title: 'Write Comment'\n- Elements:\n  - `write-comment-container` (div): Container\n  - `select-article` (dropdown): Select article to comment on\n  - `commenter-name` (input text): Name of commenter\n  - `comment-text` (textarea): Comment text\n  - `submit-comment-button` (button): Submit comment\n\n### 3.7 Trending Page\n- Filepath: `templates/trending.html`\n- Title: 'Trending Articles'\n- Elements:\n  - `trending-container` (div): Container\n  - `trending-list` (div): Ranked list of trending articles\n  - `time-period-filter` (dropdown): Filter by time period (Today, Week, Month)\n  - `view-article-button-{article_id}` (button): View article detail button\n  - `back-to-dashboard-button` (button): Return to dashboard\n\n### 3.8 Category Page\n- Filepath: `templates/category.html`\n- Title: 'Category Articles'\n- Elements:\n  - `category-container` (div): Container\n  - `category-name` (div): Category name\n  - `category-articles-list` (list): List of articles under category\n  - `sort-by-popularity-button` (button): Sort articles by popularity\n  - `back-to-dashboard-button` (button): Return to dashboard\n\n### 3.9 Search Results Page\n- Filepath: `templates/search_results.html`\n- Title: 'Search Results'\n- Elements:\n  - `search-results-container` (div): Container\n  - `search-query-display` (div): Display search query\n  - `results-list` (list): List of matching articles\n  - `no-results-message` (div): Message when no results found\n  - `back-to-dashboard-button` (button): Return to dashboard\n\n\n## 4. Data File Schemas\n\n### 4.1 Articles Data - `data/articles.txt`\n- Fields in order (no header):\n  - article_id (string): Unique ID\n  - title (string): Article title\n  - author (string): Article author\n  - category (string): Article category\n  - content (string): Full text content\n  - date (string): Publication date (YYYY-MM-DD)\n  - views (integer): Number of views\n- Example row:\n  `1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|John Smith|Technology|Full article content here...|2025-01-20|5432`\n\n### 4.2 Categories Data - `data/categories.txt`\n- Fields in order:\n  - category_id (string): Unique ID\n  - name (string): Category name\n  - description (string): Description of category\n- Example row:\n  `1|Technology|Latest news and innovations`\n\n### 4.3 Bookmarks Data - `data/bookmarks.txt`\n- Fields in order:\n  - bookmark_id (string): Unique bookmark ID\n  - article_id (string): ID of bookmarked article\n  - article_title (string): Title of bookmarked article\n  - bookmarked_date (string): Date bookmarked\n\n### 4.4 Comments Data - `data/comments.txt`\n- Fields in order:\n  - comment_id (string): Unique comment ID\n  - article_id (string): ID of article commented on\n  - commenter_name (string): Name of commenter\n  - comment_text (string): Comment text\n  - comment_date (string): Date of comment submission\n\n### 4.5 Trending Data - `data/trending.txt`\n- Fields in order:\n  - article_id (string): Unique article ID\n  - article_title (string): Article title\n  - category (string): Article category\n  - view_count (integer): Number of views\n  - period (string): Time period (Today, Week, Month)\n- Example row:\n  `1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Technology|5432|This Week`\n\n\n## 5. Navigation Mapping\n\n| Current Page       | Element ID / Action                | Navigation Target           |\n|--------------------|----------------------------------|----------------------------|\n| Dashboard          | `browse-articles-button`          | Article Catalog (`/catalog`)\n| Dashboard          | `bookmarks-button`                | Bookmarks Page (`/bookmarks`)\n| Dashboard          | `trending-button`                 | Trending Page (`/trending`)\n| Article Catalog    | `read-article-button`             | Article Detail Page (`/article/<article_id>`)\n| Article Detail     | `bookmark-article-button`         | Adds Bookmark, stays on Article Detail\n| Bookmarks          | `remove-bookmark-button-{id}`    | Removes Bookmark item\n| Bookmarks          | `back-to-dashboard-button`        | Dashboard\n| Comments           | `write-comment-button`            | Write Comment Page (`/comments/write/<article_id>`)\n| Comments           | `back-to-dashboard-button`        | Dashboard\n| Write Comment      | `submit-comment-button`           | Submits Comment, redirects to Comments Page\n| Trending           | `view-article-button-{article_id}` | Article Detail Page\n| Trending           | `back-to-dashboard-button`        | Dashboard\n| Category           | `back-to-dashboard-button`        | Dashboard\n| Search Results     | `back-to-dashboard-button`        | Dashboard\n\n---\n\n*All element IDs, routes, data file schemas, and navigation mappings are aligned for clear development of frontend and backend.*\n"})

You are a System Architect specializing in detailed and precise Flask web application design specifications for the NewsPortal project.

Your objective is to produce a comprehensive design specification file named `design_spec.md` that enables backend and frontend developers to work independently and without assumptions.

**Input Artifact:**
- `user_task_description` from CONTEXT (describes NewsPortal requirements, pages, elements, and data schemas)

**Output Artifact:**
- `design_spec.md` saved verbatim using the `write_text_file` tool

**Specification Requirements:**

1. **Flask Routes Specification:**
   - Provide a detailed table including:
     - Route Path (URL pattern)
     - Flask function name (lowercase, underscore-separated)
     - HTTP Method (GET or POST)
     - Template file to render
     - Context variables passed to templates with explicit data types (list, dict, str, int, float)
     - Expected form data for POST routes
   - Must include:
     - Root route `/` redirecting to dashboard page
     - Routes for all pages specified in user_task_description
     - Consistent and descriptive function names

2. **HTML Template Specifications:**
   - For each page's template:
     - Specify file path as `templates/{template_name}.html`
     - Define exact page titles for `<title>` and `<h1>` tags
     - List all element IDs with element types and brief descriptions
     - Specify context variables accessible in the template including data structures
     - Provide navigation mapping from buttons/links (by element IDs) to Flask routes using `url_for()` calls
     - Preserve all element ID naming patterns exactly (including dynamic patterns)
     - Use Jinja2 templating conventions for dynamic content and loops

3. **Data File Schemas:**
   - For each data file:
     - Provide file path as `data/{filename}.txt`
     - Describe pipe-delimited field order and exact field names matching user requirements
     - Describe data content and purpose
     - Provide 2-3 realistic example rows from the user examples
     - Ensure no header row is included

**Critical Success Criteria:**
- Backend developers can implement the full Flask app using only Sections 1 and 3
- Frontend developers can implement full HTML templates using Section 2
- Strict consistency of element IDs, context variable names/types, data field orders, and routing function names
- Absolutely no assumptions or features beyond user requirements
- Use the `write_text_file` tool to save `design_spec.md` exactly once when complete

**Error Prevention:**
- Re-read the user_task_description carefully to ensure all specified pages, routes, and data files are included fully
- Do not omit any dynamic element IDs or context variables
- Clearly label each section header in the markdown output
- Validate internal consistency across all sections

Produce only the `design_spec.md` content as output for writing, do not output additional files or text.

Output: design_spec.md
"""

Data Storage  The 'NewsPortal' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:  ### 1. Articles Data - **File Name**: `articles.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   article_id|title|author|category|content|date|views   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|John Smith|Technology|Revolutionary advancement in quantum computing announced today|2025-01-20|5432   2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sarah Johnson|Sports|Team wins the national championship with a thrilling final match|2025-01-19|3210   3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Michael Chen|Business|Expert analysis of current market conditions and forecasts|2025-01-18|2891   ```  ### 2. Categories Data - **File Name**: `categories.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   category_id|category_name|description   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|Technology|Latest tech news and innovations   2|Sports|Sports news and event coverage   3|Business|Business and finance news   ```  ### 3. Bookmarks Data - **File Name**: `bookmarks.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   bookmark_id|article_id|article_title|bookmarked_date   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|2025-01-20   2|3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|2025-01-18   ```  ### 4. Comments Data - **File Name**: `comments.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   comment_id|article_id|article_title|commenter_name|comment_text|comment_date   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Alice Davis|Fascinating development!|2025-01-20   2|2|Sports: Championship Victory|Robert Wilson|Amazing performance by the team!|2025-01-19   ```  ### 5. Trending Data - **File Name**: `trending.txt` - **Data Format**:   ```   article_id|article_title|category|view_count|period   ``` - **Example Data**:   ```   1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Technology|5432|This Week   2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sports|3210|This Week   3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Business|2891|This Month   ```
