       | search_results             | GET            | search_results.html       | search_query (str), matching_articles (list of dict)                                              | None                                           |\n\n## 2. HTML Template Specifications\n\n---\n\n### 2.1 Dashboard Page (templates/dashboard.html)\n- <title>: News Portal\n- <h1>: News Portal\n- Element IDs:\n  - dashboard-page (div): Container for the dashboard\n  - featured-articles (div): Display featured article recommendations\n  - browse-articles-button (button): Navigates to article catalog page\n  - view-bookmarks-button (button): Navigates to bookmarks page\n  - trending-articles-button (button): Navigates to trending articles page\n- Context Variables:\n  - featured_articles: list of dict {article_id: str, title: str, author: str, date: str, category: str}\n  - trending_articles: list of dict {article_id: str, title: str, category: str, view_count: int}\n- Navigation Mapping:\n  - browse-articles-button → url_for('article_catalog')\n  - view-bookmarks-button → url_for('bookmarks_page')\n  - trending-articles-button → url_for('trending_page')\n\n---\n\n### 2.2 Article Catalog Page (templates/catalog.html)\n- <title>: Article Catalog\n- <h1>: Article Catalog\n- Element IDs:\n  - catalog-page (div): Container for catalog page\n  - search-input (input): Text input for search query\n  - category-filter (select/dropdown): For filtering articles by category\n  - articles-grid (div): Grid of article cards\n  - view-article-button-{article_id} (button): Button to view details for each article\n- Context Variables:\n  - articles: list of dict {article_id: str, title: str, author: str, date: str, category: str, snippet: str}\n  - categories: list of dict {category_id: str, category_name: str}\n  - selected_category: str or None\n  - search_query: str or None\n- Navigation Mapping:\n  - view-article-button-{article_id} → url_for('article_detail', article_id=article_id)\n\n---\n\n### 2.3 Article Details Page (templates/article_detail.html)\n- <title>: Article Details\n- <h1>: {{ article.title }}\n- Element IDs:\n  - article-details-page (div): Container for article details\n  - article-title (h1): Article title\n  - article-author (div): Article author\n  - article-date (div): Article publication date\n  - bookmark-button (button): Button to bookmark/unbookmark article\n  - article-content (div): Full article content\n- Context Variables:\n  - article: dict {article_id: str, title: str, author: str, date: str, content: str, category: str, views: int}\n  - is_bookmarked: bool\n- Navigation Mapping:\n  - bookmark-button → POST to route handling bookmark toggle (Same page or API call)\n\n---\n\n### 2.4 Bookmarks Page (templates/bookmarks.html)\n- <title>: My Bookmarks\n- <h1>: My Bookmarks\n- Element IDs:\n  - bookmarks-page (div): Container for bookmarks\n  - bookmarks-list (div): List of bookmark entries\n  - remove-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id} (button): Button to remove specific bookmark\n  - read-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id} (button): Button to read bookmarked article\n  - back-to-dashboard (button): Button to navigate back to dashboard\n- Context Variables:\n  - bookmarks: list of dict {bookmark_id: str, article_id: str, article_title: str, bookmarked_date: str}\n- Navigation Mapping:\n  - remove-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id} → POST to remove bookmark API for bookmark_id\n  - read-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id} → url_for('article_detail', article_id=article_id)\n  - back-to-dashboard → url_for('dashboard_page')\n\n---\n\n### 2.5 Comments Page (templates/comments.html)\n- <title>: Article Comments\n- <h1>: Article Comments\n- Element IDs:\n  - comments-page (div): Container for comments\n  - comments-list (div): List of comments with article title, commenter name, comment text\n  - write-comment-button (button): Navigate to write comment page\n  - filter-by-article (select/dropdown): Filter comments by article\n  - back-to-dashboard (button): Navigate back to dashboard\n- Context Variables:\n  - comments: list of dict {comment_id: str, article_id: str, article_title: str, commenter_name: str, comment_text: str, comment_date: str}\n  - articles: list of dict {article_id: str, title: str}\n  - selected_article_id: str or None\n- Navigation Mapping:\n  - write-comment-button → url_for('write_comment_page', article_id=selected_article_id or some default)\n  - back-to-dashboard → url_for('dashboard_page')\n\n---\n\n### 2.6 Write Comment Page (templates/write_comment.html)\n- <title>: Write a Comment\n- <h1>: Write a Comment\n- Element IDs:\n  - write-comment-page (div): Container\n  - select-article (select/dropdown): Select article to comment on\n  - commenter-name (input): Input for commenter name\n  - comment-text (textarea): Textarea for comment text\n  - submit-comment-button (button): Submit the comment\n- Context Variables:\n  - articles: list of dict {article_id: str, title: str}\n  - article: dict (current article when accessed via article_id)\n- Navigation Mapping:\n  - submit-comment-button → POST form submission to same route\n\n---\n\n### 2.7 Trending Articles Page (templates/trending.html)\n- <title>: Trending Articles\n- <h1>: Trending Articles\n- Element IDs:\n  - trending-page (div): Container\n  - trending-list (div): Ranked list of trending articles\n  - time-period-filter (select/dropdown): Filter by time period (Today, This Week, This Month)\n  - view-article-button-{article_id} (button): View article detail button\n  - back-to-dashboard (button): Navigate back to dashboard\n- Context Variables:\n  - trending_articles: list of dict {article_id: str, title: str, category: str, view_count: int}\n  - time_period: str\n- Navigation Mapping:\n  - view-article-button-{article_id} → url_for('article_detail', article_id=article_id)\n  - back-to-dashboard → url_for('dashboard_page')\n\n---\n\n### 2.8 Category Page (templates/category.html)\n- <title>: Category Articles\n- <h1>: {{ category.category_name }}\n- Element IDs:\n  - category-page (div): Container\n  - category-title (h1): Category name\n  - category-articles (div): List of articles in category\n  - sort-by-date (button): Sort articles by date\n  - sort-by-popularity (button): Sort articles by popularity\n  - back-to-dashboard (button): Navigate back to dashboard\n- Context Variables:\n  - category: dict {category_id: str, category_name: str, description: str}\n  - articles: list of dict {article_id: str, title: str, author: str, date: str, views: int}\n  - sort_method: str ('date' or 'popularity')\n- Navigation Mapping:\n  - sort-by-date → reload with sort_method='date'\n  - sort-by-popularity → reload with sort_method='popularity'\n  - back-to-dashboard → url_for('dashboard_page')\n\n---\n\n### 2.9 Search Results Page (templates/search_results.html)\n- <title>: Search Results\n- <h1>: Search Results\n- Element IDs:\n  - search-results-page (div): Container\n  - search-query-display (div): Display the searched query\n  - results-list (div): List of matching articles\n  - no-results-message (div): Display if no articles match\n  - back-to-dashboard (button): Navigate back to dashboard\n- Context Variables:\n  - search_query: str\n  - matching_articles: list of dict {article_id: str, title: str, author: str, snippet: str}\n- Navigation Mapping:\n  - back-to-dashboard → url_for('dashboard_page')\n\n## 3. Data File Schemas\n\n### 3.1 Articles Data (`data/articles.txt`)\n- Pipe-delimited fields in order (no header):\n  1. article_id (str)\n  2. title (str)\n  3. author (str)\n  4. category (str)\n  5. content (str)\n  6. date (str, format YYYY-MM-DD)\n  7. views (int)\n- Purpose: Stores all news articles' meta and content.\n- Example Rows:\n  - `1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|John Smith|Technology|Revolutionary advancement in quantum computing announced today|2025-01-20|5432`\n  - `2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sarah Johnson|Sports|Team wins the national championship with a thrilling final match|2025-01-19|3210`\n  - `3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Michael Chen|Business|Expert analysis of current market conditions and forecasts|2025-01-18|2891`\n\n### 3.2 Categories Data (`data/categories.txt`)\n- Pipe-delimited fields (no header):\n  1. category_id (str)\n  2. category_name (str)\n  3. description (str)\n- Purpose: Stores categories metadata.\n- Example Rows:\n  - `1|Technology|Latest tech news and innovations`\n  - `2|Sports|Sports news and event coverage`\n  - `3|Business|Business and finance news`\n\n### 3.3 Bookmarks Data (`data/bookmarks.txt`)\n- Pipe-delimited fields (no header):\n  1. bookmark_id (str)\n  2. article_id (str)\n  3. article_title (str)\n  4. bookmarked_date (str, format YYYY-MM-DD)\n- Purpose: Stores user's bookmarked articles.\n- Example Rows:\n  - `1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|2025-01-20`\n  - `2|3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|2025-01-18`\n\n### 3.4 Comments Data (`data/comments.txt`)\n- Pipe-delimited fields (no header):\n  1. comment_id (str)\n  2. article_id (str)\n  3. article_title (str)\n  4. commenter_name (str)\n  5. comment_text (str)\n  6. comment_date (str, format YYYY-MM-DD)\n- Purpose: Stores comments on articles.\n- Example Rows:\n  - `1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Alice Davis|Fascinating development!|2025-01-20`\n  - `2|2|Sports: Championship Victory|Robert Wilson|Amazing performance by the team!|2025-01-19`\n\n### 3.5 Trending Data (`data/trending.txt`)\n- Pipe-delimited fields (no header):\n  1. article_id (str)\n  2. article_title (str)\n  3. category (str)\n  4. view_count (int)\n  5. period (str) (e.g. Today, This Week, This Month)\n- Purpose: Stores trending articles information.\n- Example Rows:\n  - `1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Technology|5432|This Week`\n  - `2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sports|3210|This Week`\n  - `3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Business|2891|This Month`\n\n\n---\n\n*This design specification document provides clear and consistent details for the implementation of the NewsPortal Flask application, frontend templates, and data storage schemas, enabling independent backend and frontend development.*\n"})

`remove-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}` → POST to remove bookmark backend route.\n  - `read-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}` → `url_for('article_detail', article_id=article_id)`\n  - `back-to-dashboard` → `url_for('dashboard_page')`\n\n---\n\n### 2.5 Comments Page (`templates/comments.html`)\n- Title: \"Article Comments\"\n- H1: \"Article Comments\"\n- Element IDs:\n  - articles (List[Dict]): list of articles for dropdown selection.\n  - article (Dict): current article when accessed with article_id.\n- Navigation Mapping:\n  - `submit-comment-button` → POST form submission to same route.\n\n---\n\n### 2.7 Trending Articles Page (`templates/trending.html`)\n- Title: \"Trending Articles\"\n- H1: \"Trending Articles\"\n- Element IDs:\n  - `trending-page` (Div): Container.\n  - `trending-list` (Div): Ranked trending articles.\n  - `time-period-filter` (Dropdown): Filter by time period (Today, This Week, This Month).\n  - `view-article-button-{article_id}` (Button): View article.\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigate back to dashboard.\n- Context Variables:\n  - trending_articles (List[Dict]): with keys article_id, title, category, view_count.\n  - time_period (str): Currently selected time period.\n- Navigation Mapping:\n  - `view-article-button-{article_id}` → `url_for('article_detail', article_id=article_id)`\n  - `back-to-dashboard` → `url_for('dashboard_page')`\n\n---\n\n### 2.8 Category Page (`templates/category.html`)\n- Title: \"Category Articles\"\n- H1: `{{ category.category_name }}`\n- Element IDs:\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Back to dashboard.\n- Context Variables:\n  - category (Dict): category_id, category_name, description.\n  - articles (List[Dict]): articles in category.\n  - sort_method (str): \"date\" or \"popularity\"\n- Navigation Mapping:\n  - `sort-by-date` → reload with sort by date\n  - `sort-by-popularity` → reload with sort by popularity\n  - `back-to-dashboard` → `url_for('dashboard_page')`\n\n---\n\n### 2.9 Search Results Page (`templates/search_results.html`)\n- Title: \"Search Results\"\n- H1: \"Search Results\"\n- Element IDs:\n  - `search-results-page` (Div): Container.\n  - `search-query-display` (Div): Search query shown.\n  - `results-list` (Div): List of matching articles.\n  - `no-results-message` (Div): Display if no results.\n  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Back to dashboard.\n- Context Variables:\n  - search_query (str)\n  - matching_articles (List[Dict]): article_id, title, author, snippet.\n- Navigation Mapping:\n  - `back-to-dashboard` → `url_for('dashboard_page')`\n\n---\n\n## 3. Data File Schemas\n\n---\n\n### 3.1 Articles Data (`data/articles.txt`)\n- Filepath: `data/articles.txt`\n- Pipe-delimited fields (no header):\n  1. article_id (str)\n  2. title (str)\n  3. author (str)\n  4. category (str)\n  5. content (str)\n  6. date (str, YYYY-MM-DD)\n  7. views (int)\n- Content/Purpose:\n  Stores all news articles with full content, metadata, and views.\n- Example Rows:\n  - `1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|John Smith|Technology|Revolutionary advancement in quantum computing announced today|2025-01-20|5432`\n  - `2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sarah Johnson|Sports|Team wins the national championship with a thrilling final match|2025-01-19|3210`\n  - `3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Michael Chen|Business|Expert analysis of current market conditions and forecasts|2025-01-18|2891`\n\n---\n\n### 3.2 Categories Data (`data/categories.txt`)\n- Filepath: `data/categories.txt`\n- Pipe-delimited fields (no header):\n  1. category_id (str)\n  2. category_name (str)\n  3. description (str)\n- Content/Purpose:\n  Stores categories metadata for article filtering.\n- Example Rows:\n  - `1|Technology|Latest tech news and innovations`\n  - `2|Sports|Sports news and event coverage`\n  - `3|Business|Business and finance news`\n\n---\n\n### 3.3 Bookmarks Data (`data/bookmarks.txt`)\n- Filepath: `data/bookmarks.txt`\n- Pipe-delimited fields (no header):\n  1. bookmark_id (str)\n  2. article_id (str)\n  3. article_title (str)\n  4. bookmarked_date (str, YYYY-MM-DD)\n- Content/Purpose:\n  Stores user's bookmarked articles for quick access.\n- Example Rows:\n  - `1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|2025-01-20`\n  - `2|3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|2025-01-18`\n\n---\n\n### 3.4 Comments Data (`data/comments.txt`)\n- Filepath: `data/comments.txt`\n- Pipe-delimited fields (no header):\n  1. comment_id (str)\n  2. article_id (str)\n  3. article_title (str)\n  4. commenter_name (str)\n  5. comment_text (str)\n  6. comment_date (str, YYYY-MM-DD)\n- Content/Purpose:\n  Stores comments on articles.\n- Example Rows:\n  - `1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Alice Davis|Fascinating development!|2025-01-20`\n  - `2|2|Sports: Championship Victory|Robert Wilson|Amazing performance by the team!|2025-01-19`\n\n---\n\n### 3.5 Trending Data (`data/trending.txt`)\n- Filepath: `data/trending.txt`\n- Pipe-delimited fields (no header):\n  1. article_id (str)\n  2. article_title (str)\n  3. category (str)\n  4. view_count (int)\n  5. period (str) (e.g., Today, This Week, This Month)\n- Content/Purpose:\n  Stores trending articles and their rankings by time period.\n- Example Rows:\n  - `1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Technology|5432|This Week`\n  - `2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sports|3210|This Week`\n  - `3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Business|2891|This Month`\n\n---\n\n*End of Design Specification.*\n"})

  [design_spec.md] # NewsPortal Web Application Design Specification  ---  ## 1. Flask Routes Specification  | Route Path                     | Flask Function Name            | HTTP Method | Template File             | Context Variables Passed to Templates with Data Types                                      | Expected POST Form Data                   | |-------------------------------|-------------------------------|-------------|---------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------------------------------------| | /                             | root                          | GET         | None (redirect to /dashboard) | None                                                                                      | None                                     | | /dashboard                    | dashboard_page                | GET         | dashboard.html            | featured_articles (list of dict), trending_articles (list of dict)                         | None                                     | | /catalog                     | article_catalog               | GET         | catalog.html              | articles (list of dict), categories (list of dict), selected_category (str/None), search_query (str/None) | None                                     | | /article/<article_id>         | article_detail                | GET         | article_detail.html       | article (dict), is_bookmarked (bool)                                                      | None                                     | | /bookmarks                   | bookmarks_page                | GET         | bookmarks.html            | bookmarks (list of dict)                                                                  | None                                     | | /comments                    | comments_page                 | GET         | comments.html             | comments (list of dict), articles (list of dict), selected_article_id (str/None)          | None                                     | | /comments/write/<article_id> | write_comment_page            | GET, POST   | write_comment.html        | article (dict), articles (list of dict)                                                  | commenter_name (str), comment_text (str) | | /trending                   | trending_page                 | GET         | trending.html             | trending_articles (list of dict), time_period (str)                                       | None                                     | | /category/<category_id>       | category_page                | GET         | category.html             | category (dict), articles (list of dict), sort_method (str)                              | None                                     | | /search                     | search_results                | GET         | search_results.html       | search_query (str), matching_articles (list of dict)                                     | None                                     |  ---  ## 2. HTML Template Specifications  ### 2.1 Dashboard Page (`templates/dashboard.html`) - Title: "News Portal" - H1: "News Portal" - Element IDs:   - `dashboard-page` (Div): Container for dashboard page.   - `featured-articles` (Div): Display featured article recommendations.   - `browse-articles-button` (Button): Navigate to article catalog page.   - `view-bookmarks-button` (Button): Navigate to bookmarks page.   - `trending-articles-button` (Button): Navigate to trending articles page. - Context Variables:   - featured_articles (List[Dict]): Each dict has article_id, title, author, date, category.   - trending_articles (List[Dict]): Each dict has article_id, title, category, view_count. - Navigation Mapping:   - `browse-articles-button` → `url_for('article_catalog')`   - `view-bookmarks-button` → `url_for('bookmarks_page')`   - `trending-articles-button` → `url_for('trending_page')`  ---  ### 2.2 Article Catalog Page (`templates/catalog.html`) - Title: "Article Catalog" - H1: "Article Catalog" - Element IDs:   - `catalog-page` (Div): Container for catalog page.   - `search-input` (Input): Field for article search by title, author, or keywords.   - `category-filter` (Dropdown): Filter by category (e.g., Technology, Sports).   - `articles-grid` (Div): Grid showing article cards with thumbnail, title, author, date.   - `view-article-button-{article_id}` (Button): Button to view article details. - Context Variables:   - articles (List[Dict]): Each dict includes article_id, title, author, date, category, snippet.   - categories (List[Dict]): Each dict includes category_id, category_name.   - selected_category (str or None)   - search_query (str or None) - Navigation Mapping:   - `view-article-button-{article_id}` → `url_for('article_detail', article_id=article_id)`  ---  ### 2.3 Article Details Page (`templates/article_detail.html`) - Title: "Article Details" - H1: `{{ article.title }}` - Element IDs:   - `article-details-page` (Div): Container for article details.   - `article-title` (H1): Article title.   - `article-author` (Div): Article author.   - `article-date` (Div): Article publication date.   - `bookmark-button` (Button): Button to bookmark article.   - `article-content` (Div): Full article content. - Context Variables:   - article (Dict): with keys article_id, title, author, date, content, category, views.   - is_bookmarked (Bool) - Navigation Mapping:   - `bookmark-button` → POST request to toggle bookmark (handled backend).  ---  ### 2.4 Bookmarks Page (`templates/bookmarks.html`) - Title: "My Bookmarks" - H1: "My Bookmarks" - Element IDs:   - `bookmarks-page` (Div): Container for bookmarks page.   - `bookmarks-list` (Div): List of bookmarked articles with title and date.   - `remove-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}` (Button): Remove specific bookmark.   - `read-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}` (Button): Read bookmarked article.   - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigate back to dashboard. - Context Variables:   - bookmarks (List[Dict]): Each dict includes bookmark_id, article_id, article_title, bookmarked_date. - Navigation Mapping:   - `remove-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}` → POST to remove bookmark backend route.   - `read-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}` → `url_for('article_detail', article_id=article_id)`   - `back-to-dashboard` → `url_for('dashboard_page')`  ---  ### 2.5 Comments Page (`templates/comments.html`) - Title: "Article Comments" - H1: "Article Comments" - Element IDs:   - `comments-page` (Div): Container for comments page.   - `comments-list` (Div): List of comments with article title, commenter name, comment text.   - `write-comment-button` (Button): Navigate to write comment page.   - `filter-by-article` (Dropdown): Filter comments by article.   - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigate back to dashboard. - Context Variables:   - comments (List[Dict]): Each dict includes comment_id, article_id, article_title, commenter_name, comment_text, comment_date.   - articles (List[Dict]): article_id and title for filtering dropdown.   - selected_article_id (str or None) - Navigation Mapping:   - `write-comment-button` → `url_for('write_comment_page', article_id=selected_article_id or default)`   - `back-to-dashboard` → `url_for('dashboard_page')`  ---  ### 2.6 Write Comment Page (`templates/write_comment.html`) - Title: "Write a Comment" - H1: "Write a Comment" - Element IDs:   - `write-comment-page` (Div): Comment writing container.   - `select-article` (Dropdown): Select article to comment on.   - `commenter-name` (Input): Commenter name field.   - `comment-text` (Textarea): Comment text field.   - `submit-comment-button` (Button): Submit comment. - Context Variables:   - articles (List[Dict]): list of articles for dropdown selection.   - article (Dict): current article when accessed with article_id. - Navigation Mapping:   - `submit-comment-button` → POST form submission to same route.  ---  ### 2.7 Trending Articles Page (`templates/trending.html`) - Title: "Trending Articles" - H1: "Trending Articles" - Element IDs:   - `trending-page` (Div): Container.   - `trending-list` (Div): Ranked trending articles.   - `time-period-filter` (Dropdown): Filter by time period (Today, This Week, This Month).   - `view-article-button-{article_id}` (Button): View article.   - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigate back to dashboard. - Context Variables:   - trending_articles (List[Dict]): with keys article_id, title, category, view_count.   - time_period (str): Currently selected time period. - Navigation Mapping:   - `view-article-button-{article_id}` → `url_for('article_detail', article_id=article_id)`   - `back-to-dashboard` → `url_for('dashboard_page')`  ---  ### 2.8 Category Page (`templates/category.html`) - Title: "Category Articles" - H1: `{{ category.category_name }}` - Element IDs:   - `category-page` (Div): Container.   - `category-title` (H1): Category name.   - `category-articles` (Div): List of articles.   - `sort-by-date` (Button): Sort by date.   - `sort-by-popularity` (Button): Sort by popularity.   - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Back to dashboard. - Context Variables:   - category (Dict): category_id, category_name, description.   - articles (List[Dict]): articles in category.   - sort_method (str): "date" or "popularity" - Navigation Mapping:   - `sort-by-date` → reload with sort by date   - `sort-by-popularity` → reload with sort by popularity   - `back-to-dashboard` → `url_for('dashboard_page')`  ---  ### 2.9 Search Results Page (`templates/search_results.html`) - Title: "Search Results" - H1: "Search Results" - Element IDs:   - `search-results-page` (Div): Container.   - `search-query-display` (Div): Search query shown.   - `results-list` (Div): List of matching articles.   - `no-results-message` (Div): Display if no results.   - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Back to dashboard. - Context Variables:   - search_query (str)   - matching_articles (List[Dict]): article_id, title, author, snippet. - Navigation Mapping:   - `back-to-dashboard` → `url_for('dashboard_page')`  ---  ## 3. Data File Schemas  ---  ### 3.1 Articles Data (`data/articles.txt`) - Filepath: `data/articles.txt` - Pipe-delimited fields (no header):   1. article_id (str)   2. title (str)   3. author (str)   4. category (str)   5. content (str)   6. date (str, YYYY-MM-DD)   7. views (int) - Content/Purpose:   Stores all news articles with full content, metadata, and views. - Example Rows:   - `1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|John Smith|Technology|Revolutionary advancement in quantum computing announced today|2025-01-20|5432`   - `2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sarah Johnson|Sports|Team wins the national championship with a thrilling final match|2025-01-19|3210`   - `3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Michael Chen|Business|Expert analysis of current market conditions and forecasts|2025-01-18|2891`  ---  ### 3.2 Categories Data (`data/categories.txt`) - Filepath: `data/categories.txt` - Pipe-delimited fields (no header):   1. category_id (str)   2. category_name (str)   3. description (str) - Content/Purpose:   Stores categories metadata for article filtering. - Example Rows:   - `1|Technology|Latest tech news and innovations`   - `2|Sports|Sports news and event coverage`   - `3|Business|Business and finance news`  ---  ### 3.3 Bookmarks Data (`data/bookmarks.txt`) - Filepath: `data/bookmarks.txt` - Pipe-delimited fields (no header):   1. bookmark_id (str)   2. article_id (str)   3. article_title (str)   4. bookmarked_date (str, YYYY-MM-DD) - Content/Purpose:   Stores user's bookmarked articles for quick access. - Example Rows:   - `1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|2025-01-20`   - `2|3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|2025-01-18`  ---  ### 3.4 Comments Data (`data/comments.txt`) - Filepath: `data/comments.txt` - Pipe-delimited fields (no header):   1. comment_id (str)   2. article_id (str)   3. article_title (str)   4. commenter_name (str)   5. comment_text (str)   6. comment_date (str, YYYY-MM-DD) - Content/Purpose:   Stores comments on articles. - Example Rows:   - `1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Alice Davis|Fascinating development!|2025-01-20`   - `2|2|Sports: Championship Victory|Robert Wilson|Amazing performance by the team!|2025-01-19`  ---  ### 3.5 Trending Data (`data/trending.txt`) - Filepath: `data/trending.txt` - Pipe-delimited fields (no header):   1. article_id (str)   2. article_title (str)   3. category (str)   4. view_count (int)   5. period (str) (e.g., Today, This Week, This Month) - Content/Purpose:   Stores trending articles and their rankings by time period. - Example Rows:   - `1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Technology|5432|This Week`   - `2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sports|3210|This Week`   - `3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Business|2891|This Month`  ---  *End of Design Specification.*

=== design_spec.md ===
# NewsPortal Web Application Design Specification

---

## 1. Flask Routes Specification

| Route Path                     | Flask Function Name            | HTTP Method | Template File             | Context Variables Passed to Templates with Data Types                                      | Expected POST Form Data                   |
|-------------------------------|-------------------------------|-------------|---------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------------------------------------|
| /                             | root                          | GET         | None (redirect to /dashboard) | None                                                                                      | None                                     |
| /dashboard                    | dashboard_page                | GET         | dashboard.html            | featured_articles (list of dict), trending_articles (list of dict)                         | None                                     |
| /catalog                     | article_catalog               | GET         | catalog.html              | articles (list of dict), categories (list of dict), selected_category (str/None), search_query (str/None) | None                                     |
| /article/<article_id>         | article_detail                | GET         | article_detail.html       | article (dict), is_bookmarked (bool)                                                      | None                                     |
| /bookmarks                   | bookmarks_page                | GET         | bookmarks.html            | bookmarks (list of dict)                                                                  | None                                     |
| /comments                    | comments_page                 | GET         | comments.html             | comments (list of dict), articles (list of dict), selected_article_id (str/None)          | None                                     |
| /comments/write/<article_id> | write_comment_page            | GET, POST   | write_comment.html        | article (dict), articles (list of dict)                                                  | commenter_name (str), comment_text (str) |
| /trending                   | trending_page                 | GET         | trending.html             | trending_articles (list of dict), time_period (str)                                       | None                                     |
| /category/<category_id>       | category_page                | GET         | category.html             | category (dict), articles (list of dict), sort_method (str)                              | None                                     |
| /search                     | search_results                | GET         | search_results.html       | search_query (str), matching_articles (list of dict)                                     | None                                     |

---

## 2. HTML Template Specifications

### 2.1 Dashboard Page (`templates/dashboard.html`)
- Title: "News Portal"
- H1: "News Portal"
- Element IDs:
  - `dashboard-page` (Div): Container for dashboard page.
  - `featured-articles` (Div): Display featured article recommendations.
  - `browse-articles-button` (Button): Navigate to article catalog page.
  - `view-bookmarks-button` (Button): Navigate to bookmarks page.
  - `trending-articles-button` (Button): Navigate to trending articles page.
- Context Variables:
  - featured_articles (List[Dict]): Each dict has article_id, title, author, date, category.
  - trending_articles (List[Dict]): Each dict has article_id, title, category, view_count.
- Navigation Mapping:
  - `browse-articles-button` → `url_for('article_catalog')`
  - `view-bookmarks-button` → `url_for('bookmarks_page')`
  - `trending-articles-button` → `url_for('trending_page')`

---

### 2.2 Article Catalog Page (`templates/catalog.html`)
- Title: "Article Catalog"
- H1: "Article Catalog"
- Element IDs:
  - `catalog-page` (Div): Container for catalog page.
  - `search-input` (Input): Field for article search by title, author, or keywords.
  - `category-filter` (Dropdown): Filter by category (e.g., Technology, Sports).
  - `articles-grid` (Div): Grid showing article cards with thumbnail, title, author, date.
  - `view-article-button-{article_id}` (Button): Button to view article details.
- Context Variables:
  - articles (List[Dict]): Each dict includes article_id, title, author, date, category, snippet.
  - categories (List[Dict]): Each dict includes category_id, category_name.
  - selected_category (str or None)
  - search_query (str or None)
- Navigation Mapping:
  - `view-article-button-{article_id}` → `url_for('article_detail', article_id=article_id)`

---

### 2.3 Article Details Page (`templates/article_detail.html`)
- Title: "Article Details"
- H1: `{{ article.title }}`
- Element IDs:
  - `article-details-page` (Div): Container for article details.
  - `article-title` (H1): Article title.
  - `article-author` (Div): Article author.
  - `article-date` (Div): Article publication date.
  - `bookmark-button` (Button): Button to bookmark article.
  - `article-content` (Div): Full article content.
- Context Variables:
  - article (Dict): with keys article_id, title, author, date, content, category, views.
  - is_bookmarked (Bool)
- Navigation Mapping:
  - `bookmark-button` → POST request to toggle bookmark (handled backend).

---

### 2.4 Bookmarks Page (`templates/bookmarks.html`)
- Title: "My Bookmarks"
- H1: "My Bookmarks"
- Element IDs:
  - `bookmarks-page` (Div): Container for bookmarks page.
  - `bookmarks-list` (Div): List of bookmarked articles with title and date.
  - `remove-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}` (Button): Remove specific bookmark.
  - `read-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}` (Button): Read bookmarked article.
  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigate back to dashboard.
- Context Variables:
  - bookmarks (List[Dict]): Each dict includes bookmark_id, article_id, article_title, bookmarked_date.
- Navigation Mapping:
  - `remove-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}` → POST to remove bookmark backend route.
  - `read-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}` → `url_for('article_detail', article_id=article_id)`
  - `back-to-dashboard` → `url_for('dashboard_page')`

---

### 2.5 Comments Page (`templates/comments.html`)
- Title: "Article Comments"
- H1: "Article Comments"
- Element IDs:
  - `comments-page` (Div): Container for comments page.
  - `comments-list` (Div): List of comments with article title, commenter name, comment text.
  - `write-comment-button` (Button): Navigate to write comment page.
  - `filter-by-article` (Dropdown): Filter comments by article.
  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigate back to dashboard.
- Context Variables:
  - comments (List[Dict]): Each dict includes comment_id, article_id, article_title, commenter_name, comment_text, comment_date.
  - articles (List[Dict]): article_id and title for filtering dropdown.
  - selected_article_id (str or None)
- Navigation Mapping:
  - `write-comment-button` → `url_for('write_comment_page', article_id=selected_article_id or default)`
  - `back-to-dashboard` → `url_for('dashboard_page')`

---

### 2.6 Write Comment Page (`templates/write_comment.html`)
- Title: "Write a Comment"
- H1: "Write a Comment"
- Element IDs:
  - `write-comment-page` (Div): Comment writing container.
  - `select-article` (Dropdown): Select article to comment on.
  - `commenter-name` (Input): Commenter name field.
  - `comment-text` (Textarea): Comment text field.
  - `submit-comment-button` (Button): Submit comment.
- Context Variables:
  - articles (List[Dict]): list of articles for dropdown selection.
  - article (Dict): current article when accessed with article_id.
- Navigation Mapping:
  - `submit-comment-button` → POST form submission to same route.

---

### 2.7 Trending Articles Page (`templates/trending.html`)
- Title: "Trending Articles"
- H1: "Trending Articles"
- Element IDs:
  - `trending-page` (Div): Container.
  - `trending-list` (Div): Ranked trending articles.
  - `time-period-filter` (Dropdown): Filter by time period (Today, This Week, This Month).
  - `view-article-button-{article_id}` (Button): View article.
  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigate back to dashboard.
- Context Variables:
  - trending_articles (List[Dict]): with keys article_id, title, category, view_count.
  - time_period (str): Currently selected time period.
- Navigation Mapping:
  - `view-article-button-{article_id}` → `url_for('article_detail', article_id=article_id)`
  - `back-to-dashboard` → `url_for('dashboard_page')`

---

### 2.8 Category Page (`templates/category.html`)
- Title: "Category Articles"
- H1: `{{ category.category_name }}`
- Element IDs:
  - `category-page` (Div): Container.
  - `category-title` (H1): Category name.
  - `category-articles` (Div): List of articles.
  - `sort-by-date` (Button): Sort by date.
  - `sort-by-popularity` (Button): Sort by popularity.
  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Back to dashboard.
- Context Variables:
  - category (Dict): category_id, category_name, description.
  - articles (List[Dict]): articles in category.
  - sort_method (str): "date" or "popularity"
- Navigation Mapping:
  - `sort-by-date` → reload with sort by date
  - `sort-by-popularity` → reload with sort by popularity
  - `back-to-dashboard` → `url_for('dashboard_page')`

---

### 2.9 Search Results Page (`templates/search_results.html`)
- Title: "Search Results"
- H1: "Search Results"
- Element IDs:
  - `search-results-page` (Div): Container.
  - `search-query-display` (Div): Search query shown.
  - `results-list` (Div): List of matching articles.
  - `no-results-message` (Div): Display if no results.
  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Back to dashboard.
- Context Variables:
  - search_query (str)
  - matching_articles (List[Dict]): article_id, title, author, snippet.
- Navigation Mapping:
  - `back-to-dashboard` → `url_for('dashboard_page')`

---

## 3. Data File Schemas

---

### 3.1 Articles Data (`data/articles.txt`)
- Filepath: `data/articles.txt`
- Pipe-delimited fields (no header):
  1. article_id (str)
  2. title (str)
  3. author (str)
  4. category (str)
  5. content (str)
  6. date (str, YYYY-MM-DD)
  7. views (int)
- Content/Purpose:
  Stores all news articles with full content, metadata, and views.
- Example Rows:
  - `1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|John Smith|Technology|Revolutionary advancement in quantum computing announced today|2025-01-20|5432`
  - `2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sarah Johnson|Sports|Team wins the national championship with a thrilling final match|2025-01-19|3210`
  - `3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Michael Chen|Business|Expert analysis of current market conditions and forecasts|2025-01-18|2891`

---

### 3.2 Categories Data (`data/categories.txt`)
- Filepath: `data/categories.txt`
- Pipe-delimited fields (no header):
  1. category_id (str)
  2. category_name (str)
  3. description (str)
- Content/Purpose:
  Stores categories metadata for article filtering.
- Example Rows:
  - `1|Technology|Latest tech news and innovations`
  - `2|Sports|Sports news and event coverage`
  - `3|Business|Business and finance news`

---

### 3.3 Bookmarks Data (`data/bookmarks.txt`)
- Filepath: `data/bookmarks.txt`
- Pipe-delimited fields (no header):
  1. bookmark_id (str)
  2. article_id (str)
  3. article_title (str)
  4. bookmarked_date (str, YYYY-MM-DD)
- Content/Purpose:
  Stores user's bookmarked articles for quick access.
- Example Rows:
  - `1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|2025-01-20`
  - `2|3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|2025-01-18`

---

### 3.4 Comments Data (`data/comments.txt`)
- Filepath: `data/comments.txt`
- Pipe-delimited fields (no header):
  1. comment_id (str)
  2. article_id (str)
  3. article_title (str)
  4. commenter_name (str)
  5. comment_text (str)
  6. comment_date (str, YYYY-MM-DD)
- Content/Purpose:
  Stores comments on articles.
- Example Rows:
  - `1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Alice Davis|Fascinating development!|2025-01-20`
  - `2|2|Sports: Championship Victory|Robert Wilson|Amazing performance by the team!|2025-01-19`

---

### 3.5 Trending Data (`data/trending.txt`)
- Filepath: `data/trending.txt`
- Pipe-delimited fields (no header):
  1. article_id (str)
  2. article_title (str)
  3. category (str)
  4. view_count (int)
  5. period (str) (e.g., Today, This Week, This Month)
- Content/Purpose:
  Stores trending articles and their rankings by time period.
- Example Rows:
  - `1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Technology|5432|This Week`
  - `2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sports|3210|This Week`
  - `3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Business|2891|This Month`

---

*End of Design Specification.*

# NewsPortal Web Application Design Specification

---

## 1. Flask Routes Specification

| Route Path                     | Flask Function Name            | HTTP Method | Template File             | Context Variables Passed to Templates with Data Types                                      | Expected POST Form Data                   |
|-------------------------------|-------------------------------|-------------|---------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------------------------------------|
| /                             | root                          | GET         | None (redirect to /dashboard) | None                                                                                      | None                                     |
| /dashboard                    | dashboard_page                | GET         | dashboard.html            | featured_articles (list of dict), trending_articles (list of dict)                         | None                                     |
| /catalog                     | article_catalog               | GET         | catalog.html              | articles (list of dict), categories (list of dict), selected_category (str/None), search_query (str/None) | None                                     |
| /article/<article_id>         | article_detail                | GET         | article_detail.html       | article (dict), is_bookmarked (bool)                                                      | None                                     |
| /bookmarks                   | bookmarks_page                | GET         | bookmarks.html            | bookmarks (list of dict)                                                                  | None                                     |
| /comments                    | comments_page                 | GET         | comments.html             | comments (list of dict), articles (list of dict), selected_article_id (str/None)          | None                                     |
| /comments/write/<article_id> | write_comment_page            | GET, POST   | write_comment.html        | article (dict), articles (list of dict)                                                  | commenter_name (str), comment_text (str) |
| /trending                   | trending_page                 | GET         | trending.html             | trending_articles (list of dict), time_period (str)                                       | None                                     |
| /category/<category_id>       | category_page                | GET         | category.html             | category (dict), articles (list of dict), sort_method (str)                              | None                                     |
| /search                     | search_results                | GET         | search_results.html       | search_query (str), matching_articles (list of dict)                                     | None                                     |

---

## 2. HTML Template Specifications

### 2.1 Dashboard Page (`templates/dashboard.html`)
- Title: "News Portal"
- H1: "News Portal"
- Element IDs:
  - `dashboard-page` (Div): Container for dashboard page.
  - `featured-articles` (Div): Display featured article recommendations.
  - `browse-articles-button` (Button): Navigate to article catalog page.
  - `view-bookmarks-button` (Button): Navigate to bookmarks page.
  - `trending-articles-button` (Button): Navigate to trending articles page.
- Context Variables:
  - featured_articles (List[Dict]): Each dict has article_id, title, author, date, category.
  - trending_articles (List[Dict]): Each dict has article_id, title, category, view_count.
- Navigation Mapping:
  - `browse-articles-button` → `url_for('article_catalog')`
  - `view-bookmarks-button` → `url_for('bookmarks_page')`
  - `trending-articles-button` → `url_for('trending_page')`

---

### 2.2 Article Catalog Page (`templates/catalog.html`)
- Title: "Article Catalog"
- H1: "Article Catalog"
- Element IDs:
  - `catalog-page` (Div): Container for catalog page.
  - `search-input` (Input): Field for article search by title, author, or keywords.
  - `category-filter` (Dropdown): Filter by category (e.g., Technology, Sports).
  - `articles-grid` (Div): Grid showing article cards with thumbnail, title, author, date.
  - `view-article-button-{article_id}` (Button): Button to view article details.
- Context Variables:
  - articles (List[Dict]): Each dict includes article_id, title, author, date, category, snippet.
  - categories (List[Dict]): Each dict includes category_id, category_name.
  - selected_category (str or None)
  - search_query (str or None)
- Navigation Mapping:
  - `view-article-button-{article_id}` → `url_for('article_detail', article_id=article_id)`

---

### 2.3 Article Details Page (`templates/article_detail.html`)
- Title: "Article Details"
- H1: `{{ article.title }}`
- Element IDs:
  - `article-details-page` (Div): Container for article details.
  - `article-title` (H1): Article title.
  - `article-author` (Div): Article author.
  - `article-date` (Div): Article publication date.
  - `bookmark-button` (Button): Button to bookmark article.
  - `article-content` (Div): Full article content.
- Context Variables:
  - article (Dict): with keys article_id, title, author, date, content, category, views.
  - is_bookmarked (Bool)
- Navigation Mapping:
  - `bookmark-button` → POST request to toggle bookmark (handled backend).

---

### 2.4 Bookmarks Page (`templates/bookmarks.html`)
- Title: "My Bookmarks"
- H1: "My Bookmarks"
- Element IDs:
  - `bookmarks-page` (Div): Container for bookmarks page.
  - `bookmarks-list` (Div): List of bookmarked articles with title and date.
  - `remove-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}` (Button): Remove specific bookmark.
  - `read-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}` (Button): Read bookmarked article.
  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigate back to dashboard.
- Context Variables:
  - bookmarks (List[Dict]): Each dict includes bookmark_id, article_id, article_title, bookmarked_date.
- Navigation Mapping:
  - `remove-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}` → POST to remove bookmark backend route.
  - `read-bookmark-button-{bookmark_id}` → `url_for('article_detail', article_id=article_id)`
  - `back-to-dashboard` → `url_for('dashboard_page')`

---

### 2.5 Comments Page (`templates/comments.html`)
- Title: "Article Comments"
- H1: "Article Comments"
- Element IDs:
  - `comments-page` (Div): Container for comments page.
  - `comments-list` (Div): List of comments with article title, commenter name, comment text.
  - `write-comment-button` (Button): Navigate to write comment page.
  - `filter-by-article` (Dropdown): Filter comments by article.
  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigate back to dashboard.
- Context Variables:
  - comments (List[Dict]): Each dict includes comment_id, article_id, article_title, commenter_name, comment_text, comment_date.
  - articles (List[Dict]): article_id and title for filtering dropdown.
  - selected_article_id (str or None)
- Navigation Mapping:
  - `write-comment-button` → `url_for('write_comment_page', article_id=selected_article_id or default)`
  - `back-to-dashboard` → `url_for('dashboard_page')`

---

### 2.6 Write Comment Page (`templates/write_comment.html`)
- Title: "Write a Comment"
- H1: "Write a Comment"
- Element IDs:
  - `write-comment-page` (Div): Comment writing container.
  - `select-article` (Dropdown): Select article to comment on.
  - `commenter-name` (Input): Commenter name field.
  - `comment-text` (Textarea): Comment text field.
  - `submit-comment-button` (Button): Submit comment.
- Context Variables:
  - articles (List[Dict]): list of articles for dropdown selection.
  - article (Dict): current article when accessed with article_id.
- Navigation Mapping:
  - `submit-comment-button` → POST form submission to same route.

---

### 2.7 Trending Articles Page (`templates/trending.html`)
- Title: "Trending Articles"
- H1: "Trending Articles"
- Element IDs:
  - `trending-page` (Div): Container.
  - `trending-list` (Div): Ranked trending articles.
  - `time-period-filter` (Dropdown): Filter by time period (Today, This Week, This Month).
  - `view-article-button-{article_id}` (Button): View article.
  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigate back to dashboard.
- Context Variables:
  - trending_articles (List[Dict]): with keys article_id, title, category, view_count.
  - time_period (str): Currently selected time period.
- Navigation Mapping:
  - `view-article-button-{article_id}` → `url_for('article_detail', article_id=article_id)`
  - `back-to-dashboard` → `url_for('dashboard_page')`

---

### 2.8 Category Page (`templates/category.html`)
- Title: "Category Articles"
- H1: `{{ category.category_name }}`
- Element IDs:
  - `category-page` (Div): Container.
  - `category-title` (H1): Category name.
  - `category-articles` (Div): List of articles.
  - `sort-by-date` (Button): Sort by date.
  - `sort-by-popularity` (Button): Sort by popularity.
  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Back to dashboard.
- Context Variables:
  - category (Dict): category_id, category_name, description.
  - articles (List[Dict]): articles in category.
  - sort_method (str): "date" or "popularity"
- Navigation Mapping:
  - `sort-by-date` → reload with sort by date
  - `sort-by-popularity` → reload with sort by popularity
  - `back-to-dashboard` → `url_for('dashboard_page')`

---

### 2.9 Search Results Page (`templates/search_results.html`)
- Title: "Search Results"
- H1: "Search Results"
- Element IDs:
  - `search-results-page` (Div): Container.
  - `search-query-display` (Div): Search query shown.
  - `results-list` (Div): List of matching articles.
  - `no-results-message` (Div): Display if no results.
  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Back to dashboard.
- Context Variables:
  - search_query (str)
  - matching_articles (List[Dict]): article_id, title, author, snippet.
- Navigation Mapping:
  - `back-to-dashboard` → `url_for('dashboard_page')`

---

## 3. Data File Schemas

---

### 3.1 Articles Data (`data/articles.txt`)
- Filepath: `data/articles.txt`
- Pipe-delimited fields (no header):
  1. article_id (str)
  2. title (str)
  3. author (str)
  4. category (str)
  5. content (str)
  6. date (str, YYYY-MM-DD)
  7. views (int)
- Content/Purpose:
  Stores all news articles with full content, metadata, and views.
- Example Rows:
  - `1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|John Smith|Technology|Revolutionary advancement in quantum computing announced today|2025-01-20|5432`
  - `2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sarah Johnson|Sports|Team wins the national championship with a thrilling final match|2025-01-19|3210`
  - `3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Michael Chen|Business|Expert analysis of current market conditions and forecasts|2025-01-18|2891`

---

### 3.2 Categories Data (`data/categories.txt`)
- Filepath: `data/categories.txt`
- Pipe-delimited fields (no header):
  1. category_id (str)
  2. category_name (str)
  3. description (str)
- Content/Purpose:
  Stores categories metadata for article filtering.
- Example Rows:
  - `1|Technology|Latest tech news and innovations`
  - `2|Sports|Sports news and event coverage`
  - `3|Business|Business and finance news`

---

### 3.3 Bookmarks Data (`data/bookmarks.txt`)
- Filepath: `data/bookmarks.txt`
- Pipe-delimited fields (no header):
  1. bookmark_id (str)
  2. article_id (str)
  3. article_title (str)
  4. bookmarked_date (str, YYYY-MM-DD)
- Content/Purpose:
  Stores user's bookmarked articles for quick access.
- Example Rows:
  - `1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|2025-01-20`
  - `2|3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|2025-01-18`

---

### 3.4 Comments Data (`data/comments.txt`)
- Filepath: `data/comments.txt`
- Pipe-delimited fields (no header):
  1. comment_id (str)
  2. article_id (str)
  3. article_title (str)
  4. commenter_name (str)
  5. comment_text (str)
  6. comment_date (str, YYYY-MM-DD)
- Content/Purpose:
  Stores comments on articles.
- Example Rows:
  - `1|1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Alice Davis|Fascinating development!|2025-01-20`
  - `2|2|Sports: Championship Victory|Robert Wilson|Amazing performance by the team!|2025-01-19`

---

### 3.5 Trending Data (`data/trending.txt`)
- Filepath: `data/trending.txt`
- Pipe-delimited fields (no header):
  1. article_id (str)
  2. article_title (str)
  3. category (str)
  4. view_count (int)
  5. period (str) (e.g., Today, This Week, This Month)
- Content/Purpose:
  Stores trending articles and their rankings by time period.
- Example Rows:
  - `1|Breaking: New Technology Breakthrough|Technology|5432|This Week`
  - `2|Sports: Championship Victory|Sports|3210|This Week`
  - `3|Business: Market Trends Analysis|Business|2891|This Month`

---

*End of Design Specification.*

               f.write(line + '\\n')\n    except Exception:\n        pass\n\ndef read_trending():\n    trending = []\n    try:\n        with open(os.path.join(data_dir, 'trending.txt'), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n            for line in f:\n                line = line.strip()\n                if not line:\n                    continue\n                parts = line.split('|')\n                if len(parts) != 5:\n                    continue\n                article_id, article_title, category, view_count, period = parts\n                trending.append({\n                    'article_id': article_id,\n                    'title': article_title,\n                    'category': category,\n                    'view_count': int(view_count),\n                    'period': for article in articles:\n        if article['article_id'] == article_id:\n            return article\n    return None\n\n# Helper to get category by id\n\ndef get_category_by_id(category_id):\n    categories = read_categories()\n    for category in categories:\n        if category['category_id'] == category_id:\n            return category\n    return None\n\n# Root route\n@app.route('/')\ndef root():\n    return redirect(url_for('dashboard_page'))\n\n# /dashboard\n@app.route('/dashboard')\ndef dashboard_page():\n    # featured_articles: list of dict article_id, title, author, date, category\n    articles = read_articles()\n    # Let's consider featured articles could be top 3 by views\n    sorted_by_views = sorted(articles, key=lambda a: a['views'], reverse=True)\n    featured_articles = []\n    for art in sorted_by_views[:3]:\n        featured_articles.append({\n            'article_id': art['article_id'],\n            'title': art['title'],\n            'author': art['author'],\n            'date': art['date'],\n            'category': art['category']\n        })\n\n    # trending_articles: from trending.txt, (article_id, title, category, view_count)\n    trending_data = read_trending()\n    trending_articles = []\n    # Filter trending articles with any period (latest only can be multiple periods, but spec doesn't specify)\n    # We include all trending as is\n    for tr in trending_data:\n        trending_articles.append({\n            'article_id': tr['article_id'],\n            'title': tr['title'],\n            'category': tr['category'],\n            'view_count': tr['view_count']\n        })\n\n    return render_template('dashboard.html', featured_articles=featured_articles, trending_articles=trending_articles)\n\n# /catalog\n@app.route('/catalog')\ndef article_catalog():\n    articles = read_articles()\n    categories = read_categories()\n\n    selected_category = request.args.get('category')\n    search_query = request.args.get('search')\n\n    filtered_articles = articles\n\n    if selected_category:\n        filtered_articles = [a for a in filtered_articles if a['category'] == selected_category]\n\n    if search_query:\n        sq = search_query.lower()\n        filtered_articles = [a for a in filtered_articles if\n                             sq in a['title'].lower() or\n                             sq in a['author'].lower() or\n                             sq in a['content'].lower()]\n\n    # Build snippet: short snippet from content from start up to first 100 chars plus ... if longer\n    articles_context = []\n    for a in filtered_articles:\n        snippet = a['content'][:100] + ('...' if len(a['content']) > 100 else '')\n        articles_context.append({\n            'article_id': a['article_id'],\n            'title': a['title'],\n            'author': a['author'],\n            'date': a['date'],\n            'category': a['category'],\n            'snippet': snippet\n        })\n\n    return render_template('catalog.html', articles=articles_context, categories=categories,\n                           selected_category=selected_category, search_query=search_query)\n\n# /article/<article_id>\n@app.route('/article/<article_id>', methods=['GET', 'POST'])\ndef article_detail(article_id):\n    article = get_article_by_id(article_id)\n    if not article:\n        return render_template('article_detail.html', article=None, is_bookmarked=False)\n\n    # Handling bookmark toggle if POST\n    if request.method == 'POST':\n        bookmarks = read_bookmarks()\n        # Check if bookmarked\n        bookmarked = any(b['article_id'] == article_id for b in bookmarks)\n        if bookmarked:\n            # Remove bookmark\n            bookmarks = [b for b in bookmarks if b['article_id'] != article_id]\n        else:\n            # Add bookmark\n            # create new bookmark ID\n            used_ids = {int(b['bookmark_id']) for b in bookmarks if b['bookmark_id'].isdigit()}\n            new_id = str(max(used_ids) + 1 if used_ids else 1)\n            bookmarked_date = datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d')\n            bookmarks.append({\n                'bookmark_id': new_id,\n                'article_id': article_id,\n                'article_title': article['title'],\n                'bookmarked_date': bookmarked_date\n            })\n        write_bookmarks(bookmarks)\n\n    # is_bookmarked: check if article is bookmarked\n    bookmarks = read_bookmarks()\n    is_bookmarked = any(b['article_id'] == article_id for b in bookmarks)\n\n    return render_template('article_detail.html', article=article, is_bookmarked=is_bookmarked)\n\n# /bookmarks\n@app.route('/bookmarks', methods=['GET', 'POST'])\ndef bookmarks_page():\n    # If POST, possible removing bookmark\n    if request.method == 'POST':\n        bookmark_id = request.form.get('bookmark_id')\n        if bookmark_id:\n            bookmarks = read_bookmarks()\n            bookmarks = [b for b in bookmarks if b['bookmark_id'] != bookmark_id]\n            write_bookmarks(bookmarks)\n\n    bookmarks = read_bookmarks()\n    return render_template('bookmarks.html', bookmarks=bookmarks)\n\n# /comments\n@app.route('/comments')\ndef comments_page():\n    articles = read_articles()\n    comments = read_comments()\n\n    selected_article_id = request.args.get('article_id')\n\n    filtered_comments = comments\n    if selected_article_id:\n        filtered_comments = [c for c in filtered_comments if c['article_id'] == selected_article_id]\n\n    return render_template('comments.html', comments=filtered_comments, articles=articles, selected_article_id=selected_article_id)\n\n# /comments/write/<article_id>\n@app.route('/comments/write/<article_id>', methods=['GET', 'POST'])\ndef write_comment_page(article_id):\n    articles = read_articles()\n    article = get_article_by_id(article_id)\n    if not article:\n        return render_template('write_comment.html', article=None, articles=articles)\n\n    if request.method == 'POST':\n        commenter_name = request.form.get('commenter_name')\n        comment_text = request.form.get('comment_text')\n\n        if commenter_name and comment_text:\n            comments = read_comments()\n            used_ids = {int(c['comment_id']) for c in comments if c['comment_id'].isdigit()}\n            new_id = str(max(used_ids) + 1 if used_ids else 1)\n            comment_date = datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d')\n\n            comments.append({\n                'comment_id': new_id,\n                'article_id': article_id,\n                'article_title': article['title'],\n                'commenter_name': commenter_name,\n                'comment_text': comment_text,\n                'comment_date': comment_date\n            })\n\n            write_comments(comments)\n\n            # After submitting comment, redirect to comments page filtered by this article\n            return redirect(url_for('comments_page', article_id=article_id))\n\n    return render_template('write_comment.html', article=article, articles=articles)\n\n# /trending\n@app.route('/trending')\ndef trending_page():\n    time_period = request.args.get('period', 'This Week')\n    trending_data = read_trending()\n    filtered_trending = [t for t in trending_data if t['period'] == time_period]\n\n    trending_articles = []\n    for tr in filtered_trending:\n        trending_articles.append({\n            'article_id': tr['article_id'],\n            'title': tr['title'],\n            'category': tr['category'],\n            'view_count': tr['view_count']\n        })\n\n    return render_template('trending.html', trending_articles=trending_articles, time_period=time_period)\n\n# /category/<category_id>\n@app.route('/category/<category_id>')\ndef category_page(category_id):\n    category = get_category_by_id(category_id)\n    if not category:\n        return render_template('category.html', category=None, articles=[], sort_method='date')\n\n    sort_method = request.args.get('sort', 'date')\n\n    articles = read_articles()\n    category_articles = [a for a in articles if a['category'] == category['category_name']]\n\n    if sort_method == 'date':\n        category_articles.sort(key=lambda a: a['date'], reverse=True)\n    elif sort_method == 'popularity':\n        category_articles.sort(key=lambda a: a['views'], reverse=True)\n\n    return render_template('category.html', category=category, articles=category_articles, sort_method=sort_method)\n\n# /search\n@app.route('/search')\ndef search_results():\n    search_query = request.args.get('q', '')\n    articles = read_articles()\n\n    matching_articles = []\n    if search_query:\n        sq = search_query.lower()\n        for a in articles:\n            if sq in a['title'].lower() or sq in a['author'].lower() or sq in a['content'].lower():\n                snippet = a['content'][:100] + ('...' if len(a['content']) > 100 else '')\n                matching_articles.append({\n                    'article_id': a['article_id'],\n                    'title': a['title'],\n                    'author': a['author'],\n                    'snippet': snippet\n                })\n\n    return render_template('search_results.html', search_query=search_query, matching_articles=matching_articles)\n\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    app.run(debug=True)\n"})
